hf:2603.14473.task: Learning scientific taste for high-impact research idea evaluation
hf:2603.14473.inputs: Paper pairs (high vs low citation) and research ideas
hf:2603.14473.outputs: Preference scores for research ideas with estimated impact potential
hf:2603.14473.key_results: Scientific Judge outperforms GPT-4 and Gemini 3 Pro; Scientific Thinker proposes higher-impact ideas than baselines
hf:2603.14473.comments: Training paradigm addresses an underexplored aspect of AI science—taste rather than execution—though real-world impact validation awaits.

hf:2603.15594.task: Open-source frontier-level web search agent training
hf:2603.15594.inputs: Synthesized complex multi-hop QA tasks from web graph reverse-engineering
hf:2603.15594.outputs: Search actions and answers from web traversal
hf:2603.15594.key_results: 11.7k samples achieve SOTA on BrowseComp (29.5% vs 15.3%), matching/exceeding industrial competitors
hf:2603.15594.comments: Democratization via open data and simple SFT is notable; scalability to truly complex real-world search unknown.

hf:2603.13594.task: Evaluating agentic planning in realistic enterprise workflows
hf:2603.13594.model: (transformer) Claude Opus 4.5 and 13 other frontier models
hf:2603.13594.inputs: Stateful tasks with database tables, tools, and persistent state
hf:2603.13594.outputs: Task completion actions; success/failure on mission-critical workflows
hf:2603.13594.key_results: Top model (Claude 4.5) achieves 37.4% success; oracle plans improve by 14–35pp; refusal rate only 53.9%
hf:2603.13594.comments: Benchmark exposes critical safety gaps (poor refusal) and strategic reasoning bottlenecks; deployment readiness remains uncertain.

hf:2603.15583.task: City-scale world model grounded in real Seoul street-view imagery
hf:2603.15583.model: (transformer) Autoregressive video diffusion with retrieval conditioning
hf:2603.15583.inputs: Street-view images, camera trajectories, text prompts
hf:2603.15583.outputs: Spatially faithful, temporally consistent long-horizon urban videos
hf:2603.15583.key_results: Outperforms recent video world models over hundreds of meters; supports diverse camera movements and text variations
hf:2603.15583.comments: Grounding to real cities is innovative; evaluation limited to three cities and street-view perspective bias unknown.

hf:2603.15612.task: Physics-aware 3D reconstruction of human-scene interactions for simulation
hf:2603.15612.model: (RL-based optimizer) Bi-directional optimization with physics simulator
hf:2603.15612.inputs: Sparse images or monocular videos of human-scene interactions
hf:2603.15612.outputs: Simulation-ready 3D reconstructions with stable contact and dynamics
hf:2603.15612.key_results: First stable HSI reconstructions deployable on humanoid robots; HSIBench benchmark introduced
hf:2603.15612.comments: Physics-in-the-loop supervision closes perception-simulation gap; real robot validation limited to initial tests.

hf:2603.15031.task: Efficient residual connection aggregation via learned depth-wise attention
hf:2603.15031.outputs: Content-dependent aggregated hidden states with controlled scaling
hf:2603.15031.key_results: Consistent improvement across model sizes; 3B active params outperform dense baselines; Kimi 48B achieves gains on all tasks
hf:2603.15031.comments: Addresses PreNorm dilution elegantly; practical overhead (cache + communication) well-mitigated by Block variant.

hf:2603.15619.task: Depth scaling via mixture-of-depths attention mechanism
hf:2603.15619.inputs: Current layer KV pairs and depth KV pairs from preceding layers
hf:2603.15619.key_results: 0.2 perplexity improvement across 10 benchmarks; 2.11% downstream task gain; 97.3% FlashAttention-2 efficiency
hf:2603.15619.comments: Hardware-efficient algorithm is strong; post-norm pairing preference differs from standard practice and warrants investigation.

hf:2603.15590.task: Distilling transformer LLMs into xLSTM sub-quadratic architectures
hf:2603.15590.model: (recurrent) xLSTM student; distilled from Llama, Qwen, Olmo teachers
hf:2603.15590.inputs: Teacher model activations and task labels
hf:2603.15590.outputs: Compressed xLSTM-based student models with merging stage
hf:2603.15590.key_results: Recovers most teacher performance; some tasks exceed teacher; lossless distillation framework introduced
hf:2603.15590.comments: Addresses efficiency–performance tradeoff; limited analysis of which tasks benefit most from recurrent architectures.

hf:2603.15557.task: Diagnosing hallucinations in vision-language models via interpretable cognitive state space
hf:2603.15557.outputs: Hallucination detection and attribution to perceptual, logical, or decisional pathologies
hf:2603.15557.key_results: SOTA hallucination detection on POPE, MME, MS-COCO; geometric-information duality principle discovered
hf:2603.15557.comments: Novel cognitive-science framing is elegant; generalization to newer VLM architectures and real-world misinformation unknown.

hf:2603.15478.task: Video-free tuning of video diffusion transformers via 2D image adaptation
hf:2603.15478.model: (transformer) DiT-based video diffusion with architectural reparameterization
hf:2603.15478.inputs: 2D image data; sparse video control signals at inference
hf:2603.15478.outputs: Controllable and temporally consistent video generation/editing
hf:2603.15478.key_results: Achieves video control without video training data; maintains temporal consistency with minimal parameters
hf:2603.15478.comments: Data-efficient approach is practical; video-free tuning limits fine-grained motion quality compared to video-trained baselines.

hf:2603.14769.task: Stochastic generative optimization of complex systems (prompts, agents, code)
hf:2603.14769.model: (transformer) LLM optimizer with priority-queue and ε-Net diversity
hf:2603.14769.inputs: Numerical rewards, text feedback, candidate solutions
hf:2603.14769.outputs: Optimized system configurations with theoretical convergence guarantees
hf:2603.14769.key_results: Convergence proof under stochasticity; SOTA on τ-bench, HotpotQA, VeriBench, KernelBench
hf:2603.14769.comments: Theoretical framework is solid; sample efficiency gains over RL baselines are significant.

hf:2603.10505.task: Safe web agent training via cloned, verifiable synthetic websites
hf:2603.10505.model: (transformer) LLM agent learning from auto-generated Python SDK environments
hf:2603.10505.inputs: Real website clones as executable environments; self-generated tasks
hf:2603.10505.outputs: Agent actions with deterministic, programmatically verifiable rewards
hf:2603.10505.key_results: Agents generalize to unseen real sites; site-specific mastery via self-evolution; scales with environment count
hf:2603.10505.comments: Decoupling from unsafe real-world interaction is valuable; generalization to dynamically updated sites untested.

hf:2603.14610.task: Interpreting classifier invariants via semantic null-space geometry
hf:2603.14610.outputs: Equivalent images with natural language semantic interpretations
hf:2603.14610.key_results: ResNet50 leaks semantic attributes; DinoViT (ViT-DINO) maintains class semantics better
hf:2603.14610.comments: Interpretability method is novel; real-world bias detection applications under-explored.

hf:2603.12529.task: Learning optimal early-exit points for chain-of-thought reasoning
hf:2603.12529.outputs: Exit decision to terminate reasoning early
hf:2603.12529.key_results: 14–55% reduction in CoT length; maintains or improves accuracy on MATH-500, AIME 2025, HumanEval, GPQA
hf:2603.12529.comments: Addresses computational waste in LRMs; depends on consistent answer positioning which may vary with task.

hf:2603.13391.task: Benchmarking multimodal LLMs for webpage recreation from demonstration videos
hf:2603.13391.key_results: Best model 64% accuracy; human-aligned rubric achieves 96% agreement; systematic gaps in fine-grained style/motion
hf:2603.13391.comments: First video-to-webpage benchmark; controlled synthesis avoids real-world data noise but limits diversity.

hf:2603.15500.task: Understanding reasoning mechanisms via information-theoretic epistemic verbalization
hf:2603.15500.model: (transformer) LLM with procedural vs. epistemic decomposition
hf:2603.15500.outputs: Uncertainty externalization signals and information acquisition measures
hf:2603.15500.key_results: Strong reasoning driven by uncertainty externalization, not surface tokens; unified Aha-moment interpretation
hf:2603.15500.comments: Information-theoretic framework clarifies reasoning dynamics; causality claims await targeted interventions.

hf:2603.15611.task: Adversarial co-evolution of code and test generation via self-play
hf:2603.15611.model: (transformer) Code LLM and Test LLM with opposing RL objectives
hf:2603.15611.inputs: Code generation tasks; test suite generation constraints
hf:2603.15611.outputs: Code implementations and adversarial test cases
hf:2603.15611.key_results: Matches human-annotated test performance; 6x parameter efficiency; eliminates self-collusion vs. prior self-play
hf:2603.15611.comments: Architectural separation prevents self-collusion; white-box test generation enables targeted adversarial testing.

hf:2603.15558.outputs: Instance-level affordance masks and QA predictions
hf:2603.15558.key_results: PAP-12K benchmark introduced; existing methods fail; PAP outperforms baselines on panoramic affordance
hf:2603.15558.comments: First panoramic affordance work; PAP's training-free design is elegant but evaluation limited to synthetic PAP-12K.

hf:2603.15016.task: Human motion generation via Riemannian manifold representation
hf:2603.15016.model: (flow matching) Riemannian Motion Generation (RMG) on product manifolds
hf:2603.15016.outputs: Skeletal motion sequences on learned manifold
hf:2603.15016.key_results: SOTA FID (0.043 HumanML3D); R@1 0.86 on MotionMillion; T+R factorization most stable
hf:2603.15016.comments: Geometry-aware modeling is principled; manifold structure improves sample efficiency and intrinsic normalization.

hf:2603.14145.task: Evaluating multimodal understanding and reasoning over long, complex videos
hf:2603.14145.inputs: Long web-collected videos with audio-visual content
hf:2603.14145.outputs: Multi-turn QA answers requiring omni-modal reasoning
hf:2603.14145.key_results: Best closed-source 64.2%; best open-source 46.8%; systematic failure modes on long-form videos
hf:2603.14145.comments: MMOU addresses real gap in video benchmarking; taxonomy of failures (temporal reasoning, modality integration) valuable.

hf:2603.13985.task: Unified perspective on post-training via SFT and RL
hf:2603.13985.model: (transformer) Comprehensive survey of SFT and RL paradigms for LLMs
hf:2603.13985.outputs: Aligned model outputs for specific tasks/domains
hf:2603.13985.key_results: Hybrid paradigms emerging; clear delineation of when SFT vs. RL effective; 2023–2025 trends synthesized
hf:2603.13985.comments: Survey clarifies theoretical connections; practical guidance for practitioners; limited novel algorithmic contributions.

hf:2603.13364.task: Fine-grained MoE with dimension expansion and efficient inference
hf:2603.13364.model: (MoE) FineRMoE with intermediate and output dimension specialization
hf:2603.13364.key_results: 6x parameter efficiency; 281x prefill latency reduction; 136x decoding throughput vs. baseline
hf:2603.13364.comments: Upcycling mechanism enables cost-effective scaling; sparse computation paradigm well-suited to real inference.

hf:2603.15563.task: Large-scale competitive and long-context reasoning benchmark via Pokemon
hf:2603.15563.model: (RL/LLM) Heterogeneous baselines: heuristic, RL, LLM agents
hf:2603.15563.key_results: 100+ teams competed; LLM, RL, human performance gaps evident; nearly orthogonal to standard LLM benchmarks
hf:2603.15563.comments: Living benchmark and leaderboard valuable; Pokemon orthogonality to MMLU-style evals highlights complementary reasoning.

hf:2603.15555.task: Single-image relighting with fine-grained physical control
hf:2603.15555.model: (diffusion) LightCtrl with latent proxy encoder and DPO-based refinement
hf:2603.15555.inputs: Single image; lighting direction, intensity, color parameters
hf:2603.15555.key_results: +2.4 dB PSNR; 35% lower RMSE; ScaLight dataset with systematic variations
hf:2603.15555.comments: Physics priors at two levels elegantly balance control and quality; DPO for consistency is novel for relighting.

hf:2603.15026.task: Training-free detection of synthetic videos via spatial-temporal likelihood
hf:2603.15026.outputs: Likelihood score indicating synthetic vs. real
hf:2603.15026.key_results: Outperforms image/video baselines; ComGenVid benchmark introduced; zero-shot generalization to new generators
hf:2603.15026.comments: Training-free approach mitigates data scarcity; theoretical justification via probabilistic framework solid.

hf:2603.14941.task: Remote sensing spatiotemporal understanding and future forecasting
hf:2603.14941.model: (diffusion transformer) RS-WorldModel with geo-aware pre-training, SIT, VRO
hf:2603.14941.outputs: Spatiotemporal change QA answers; text-guided future scenes
hf:2603.14941.key_results: 2B params outperform 120x larger open-source; FID 43.13 on forecasting; surpasses Gemini-2.5-Flash Nano
hf:2603.14941.comments: Joint task learning and VRO refinement effective; dataset contribution (RSWBench-1.1M) valuable for remote sensing.

hf:2603.14659.task: Grounded video reasoning via adaptive visual prompting during RL training
hf:2603.14659.model: (transformer) VisionCoach with visual prompt selector and spatio-temporal reasoner
hf:2603.14659.inputs: Video, question; visual prompts selected based on input; grounding rewards
hf:2603.14659.outputs: Reasoning trajectory with spatio-temporal grounding; final answer
hf:2603.14659.key_results: SOTA on V-STAR, VideoMME, World-Sense, VideoMMMU, PerceptionTest, Charades-STA; single-pass inference
hf:2603.14659.comments: Input-adaptive prompting during training with self-distillation is practical; grounding rewards enforce consistency.

hf:2603.15617.task: Measuring AI progress on unsolved mathematical discovery problems
hf:2603.15617.model: (transformer) GPT-4o, GPT-5.4 Pro and other LLMs
hf:2603.15617.key_results: GPT-5.4 Pro solves 2 problems improving published results; near-zero baseline performance; immune to contamination
hf:2603.15617.comments: Data contamination immunity valuable; verification via simple computation scales better than formal proofs.

hf:2603.15616.task: Glyph-accurate visual text rendering via region-grouped preference optimization
hf:2603.15616.inputs: Text prompts, styling directives; region-level glyph preferences
hf:2603.15616.outputs: Rendered text images with accurate glyphs
hf:2603.15616.key_results: +2.4 dB PSNR; 35% lower RMSE on glyph errors; controllable accuracy via Regional Reward Guidance
hf:2603.15616.comments: Region-level preference modeling finer than standard DPO; ScaLight dataset valuable; out-of-domain generalization untested.

hf:2603.15614.task: Unified video control: scene, subject, motion via tri-prompting
hf:2603.15614.model: (diffusion transformer) Tri-Prompting with dual-condition motion module
hf:2603.15614.inputs: Scene text; subject RGB/tracking; camera/object 3D poses
hf:2603.15614.key_results: Outperforms Phantom, DaS on multi-view identity; supports novel workflows (3D-aware insertion, manipulation)
hf:2603.15614.comments: Unified architecture for three control axes is comprehensive; ControlNet scale schedule balances control vs. realism.

hf:2603.15389.task: Depth scaling via sparsity as variance regulator in LLMs
hf:2603.15389.model: (transformer) Depth-scaling LLM with implicit/explicit sparsity analysis
hf:2603.15389.inputs: Token representations across layers with varying sparsity
hf:2603.15389.outputs: Stabilized hidden-state growth and improved layer utilization
hf:2603.15389.key_results: 4.6% accuracy improvement; consistent across depth-scaling exps; depth-utilization recipe distilled
hf:2603.15389.comments: Variance propagation mechanism via sparsity is novel insight; empirical validation solid; rule-of-thumb practical.

hf:2603.12146.task: Few-step trajectory-controllable video generation with distillation
hf:2603.12146.model: (diffusion) FlashMotion: multi-step adapter distilled to few-step with hybrid finetuning
hf:2603.12146.outputs: Few-step video following trajectory with high quality
hf:2603.12146.key_results: Outperforms video distillation baselines; FlashBench for long-sequence trajectory control introduced
hf:2603.12146.comments: Hybrid diffusion-adversarial finetuning overcomes naive distillation degradation; computational speedup significant.

hf:2603.15620.task: Vision-Language-Action for generalizable manipulation in dynamic environments
hf:2603.15620.model: (transformer) PUMA: dynamics-aware VLA with optical flow and world queries
hf:2603.15620.inputs: Observations, language instructions; scene-centric optical flow history
hf:2603.15620.key_results: 6.3% absolute improvement over baselines; dynamic data transfers to static tasks; 35 task DOMINO benchmark
hf:2603.15620.comments: Spatiotemporal modeling via history-aware perception bridges vision-action gap; real robot validation limited.

hf:2603.15206.task: Efficient document parsing via parallel token prediction
hf:2603.15206.model: (VLM) Parallel-Token Prediction (PTP) with learnable token insertion
hf:2603.15206.inputs: Document images; learnable parallel token positions
hf:2603.15206.key_results: 1.6–2.2x decoding speedup; reduced hallucinations; strong generalization
hf:2603.15206.comments: Model-agnostic approach generalizes across VLMs; parallel decoding reduces latency substantially.

hf:2603.14371.task: Unified KV cache management for multi-task parallel VLA inference
hf:2603.14371.model: (transformer) OxyGen: cross-task and cross-frame KV sharing for MoT VLAs
hf:2603.14371.inputs: Multi-task outputs (manipulation, conversation, memory); shared observations
hf:2603.14371.outputs: Language tokens and action sequences with shared prefill cache
hf:2603.14371.key_results: 3.7x speedup; 200 tokens/s language + 70 Hz action frequency simultaneously
hf:2603.14371.comments: KV cache as first-class resource is elegant; on-device multi-task deployment practical; real robot validation pending.

hf:2603.14347.task: Measuring motivation in large language models
hf:2603.14347.key_results: Structured patterns echo human psychology; motivation aligns with behavior, varies by task, modulates with context
hf:2603.14347.comments: Motivation as organizing construct for model behavior is insightful; anthropomorphization concerns merit caution.

hf:2603.14313.task: Decoding monetary policy stance from FOMC statements via relative temporal structure
hf:2603.14313.inputs: FOMC statements; consecutive meeting pairs as self-supervision
hf:2603.14313.key_results: 71.1% sentence-level accuracy; strong inflation correlation; Treasury yield association significant
hf:2603.14313.comments: Self-supervision via temporal structure eliminates annotation cost; economic validation valuable.

hf:2603.14312.task: Autonomous scientific investigation via emergent agent coordination and artifact exchange
hf:2603.14312.model: (LLM agents) Multi-agent system with skill registry, artifact DAG, and synthesis
hf:2603.14312.inputs: Scientific tasks; 300+ interoperable skills; open needs broadcast
hf:2603.14312.outputs: Artifacts with full provenance; published scientific findings
hf:2603.14312.key_results: Demonstrated on peptide design, ceramics, cross-domain resonance, formal analogy; novel contributions identified
hf:2603.14312.comments: Plannerless coordination via pressure-based scoring elegant; provenance tracking supports auditability; peer review integration novel.

hf:2603.12743.task: Knowledge-aware concept customization with cross-modal knowledge transfer
hf:2603.12743.model: (diffusion) MoKus with visual anchor learning and textual knowledge updating
hf:2603.12743.inputs: Target visual concept; diverse textual knowledge; reference images
hf:2603.12743.outputs: High-fidelity customized generation binding knowledge to concept
hf:2603.12743.key_results: Outperforms concept customization baselines; extends to virtual concept creation and erasure; KnowCusBench introduced
hf:2603.12743.comments: Cross-modal transfer insight is valuable; knowledge binding without explicit concept tokens practical.

hf:2603.13428.task: Evaluating autonomous agents on continuous software evolution tasks
hf:2603.13428.model: (LLM agents) 12 frontier models; 4 agent frameworks evaluated
hf:2603.13428.inputs: Verifiable Milestone DAGs from commit logs; evolving software context
hf:2603.13428.outputs: Code modifications maintaining system integrity over iterations
hf:2603.13428.key_results: Performance drops from 80%+ on isolated tasks to ≤38% in continuous settings; error propagation critical bottleneck
hf:2603.13428.comments: Temporal dependencies and technical debt exposure valuable; EvoClaw benchmark addresses real deployment gap.

hf:2603.14645.task: Improving diffusion latent quality via spectral matching
hf:2603.14645.key_results: Superior generation on CelebA/ImageNet; spectral view unifies prior observations (VA-VAE, EQ-VAE)
hf:2603.14645.comments: Theoretical framework clarifies latent design; frequency-aligned reconstruction principled; practical speedups modest.

hf:2603.14153.task: Outfit-level virtual try-on with multiple garments and accessories
hf:2603.14153.model: (diffusion/CNN) SOTA VTON and image-editing models adapted as baselines
hf:2603.14153.inputs: Reference garment images (3–12 per outfit); model image; outfit annotations
hf:2603.14153.outputs: Virtual try-on with correct layering and styling
hf:2603.14153.key_results: Garments2Look: 80K outfit pairs, 40 categories, 300+ subcategories; current methods struggle with layering inference
hf:2603.14153.comments: First multi-garment VTON dataset valuable; synthesis pipeline with filtering/validation ensures quality; baselines expose layering gap.

hf:2603.13884.task: Multi-modal concept discovery via sparse CCA-aligned decomposition
hf:2603.13884.model: (CLIP-based) Sparse Concept CCA (SCoCCA) with CCA alignment
hf:2603.13884.outputs: Disentangled concept activations with cross-modal alignment
hf:2603.13884.key_results: SOTA concept discovery; improved activation, ablation, semantic manipulation; sparsity enforces disentanglement
hf:2603.13884.comments: CCA-InfoNCE connection elegant; cross-modal interpretability extension valuable; concept semantics remain implicit.

hf:2603.13518.task: Full-stream TTS with dynamic speaking-rate control mid-utterance
hf:2603.13518.model: (diffusion) VoXtream2 with distribution matching and classifier-free guidance
hf:2603.13518.inputs: Incremental text; audio prompt (optional); desired speaking rate
hf:2603.13518.outputs: Streaming audio with minimal latency and controllable rate
hf:2603.13518.key_results: 4x faster than real-time; 74 ms first-packet latency on consumer GPU; competitive zero-shot quality
hf:2603.13518.comments: Distribution matching for duration control practical; textless prompting removes transcription burden.

hf:2603.15150.task: Scaling discrete image generation with large VQ codebooks
hf:2603.15150.inputs: Images; VQ codebook indices with soft neighbor distributions
hf:2603.15150.outputs: Generated images via large-codebook discrete representation
hf:2603.15150.key_results: Improved convergence and generation quality vs. hard cross-entropy; effective on ImageNet-256, text-to-image, editing
hf:2603.15150.comments: Geometry-aware soft targets elegant; neighbor proximity proportionality intuitive; scaling benefits consistent.

hf:2603.13962.task: Privacy-preserving EHR question answering on commodity hardware
hf:2603.13962.model: (transformer) Smaller LLMs optimized for local deployment
hf:2603.13962.inputs: EHR data; clinical questions across four subtasks
hf:2603.13962.key_results: Competitive leaderboard performance without cloud APIs; above-average on two subtasks; feasibility on single notebook
hf:2603.13962.comments: Clinical deployment constraints (privacy, compute) well-addressed; local-only evaluation valuable for regulated domains.

hf:2603.08258.task: One-step image synthesis via efficient diffusion distillation
hf:2603.08258.inputs: Multi-step diffusion teacher model weights and image-text pairs
hf:2603.08258.outputs: One-step image generator with distilled weights
hf:2603.08258.key_results: State-of-the-art FID on COCO 2014/2017 using ~10% of teacher parameters; strong generalization to controllable generation and high-resolution synthesis
hf:2603.08258.comments: Weight direction analysis provides interpretable insight into distillation, though computational cost of the direction-aware training itself is not thoroughly discussed.

hf:2603.08436.key_results: VET-Bench shows SOTA VLMs at chance level; SGCoT method achieves >90% accuracy
hf:2603.08436.comments: Identifies fundamental expressivity limitation in fixed-depth transformers for indistinguishable object tracking without intermediate supervision.

hf:2603.12793.key_results: Matches/surpasses advanced UMMs; 4x token compression; outperforms Llava-1.5B on GenEval/MMBench with 20% training cost
hf:2603.12793.comments: Decouples patch-level details from semantics to enable stable joint understanding and high-fidelity generation.

hf:2603.11647.key_results: ~25 FPS on single GPU with visual quality parity to bidirectional teacher
hf:2603.11647.comments: First framework to distill bidirectional diffusion into streaming causal model; addresses multi-modal synchronization drift via asymmetric block-causal alignment.

hf:2603.13224.key_results: +8.4 on chart-to-code, +2.7/+4.1 on table/SVG; 8B model outperforms Qwen3-VL-235B on VC-RewardBench
hf:2603.13224.comments: Proposes task-agnostic visual reward model that operates directly in visual space, avoiding reward hacking vulnerabilities of text/embedding-based approaches.

hf:2603.12262.task: Real-time streaming video understanding with reasoning
hf:2603.12262.key_results: 79.5% StreamingBench, 59.3% OVO-Bench; 15.7x faster than Video-R1 with +5.4% on VideoHolmes
hf:2603.12262.comments: Amortizes LLM reasoning latency over video playback; generates streaming QA pairs via knowledge graphs with entity-relation grounding.

hf:2603.13032.key_results: Second on OCR Arena Elo; 83.9 on olmOCR Bench; outperforms Gemini 3 Pro on image-to-SVG benchmarks
hf:2603.13032.comments: Treats graphics as first-class parsing targets; enables multimodal supervision from existing documents.

hf:2603.12266.outputs: Execution paths through multi-layer reasoning chains
hf:2603.12266.key_results: SOTA achieves only 53.33 Path F1; sharp performance drops on hard negatives and with depth/complexity
hf:2603.12266.comments: MM-CondChain benchmark uses programmatically verified intermediate representation (VPIR) to ensure mechanical verifiability of conditions.

hf:2603.13089.key_results: Competitive restoration on multiple tasks with <2% of existing training data; rivals specialized restoration architectures
hf:2603.13089.comments: Reinterprets restoration as progressive generative process; shows video models implicitly learn transferable restoration priors.

hf:2603.07815.key_results: 1.83x speedup on Stable Diffusion 3 vs existing mixture-of-models methods
hf:2603.07815.comments: Separates image into easy regions (early small model transition) and complex regions (large model refinement); treats generation as editing problem.

hf:2603.11975.task: Unsafe action detection for household robots
hf:2603.11975.key_results: Superior latency-performance trade-off via hierarchical lightweight FastBrain + asynchronous SlowBrain
hf:2603.11975.comments: HomeSafe-Bench uses hybrid simulation+video generation pipeline; identifies perception latency and common-sense knowledge as critical bottlenecks.

hf:2603.08127.outputs: Novel scientific ideas and code implementations
hf:2603.08127.key_results: Outperforms 7 SOTA systems in novelty/feasibility/relevance; substantially improves code execution success via self-evolution
hf:2603.08127.comments: Three-agent system (Researcher/Engineer/Evolution Manager) with dual persistent memory (ideation + experimentation) for continuous strategy improvement.

hf:2603.11896.model: (MLLM streaming) Think While Watching with Qwen3-VL
hf:2603.11896.key_results: +2.6% on StreamingBench, +3.79% on OVO-Bench; 56% fewer output tokens in multi-round setting
hf:2603.11896.comments: Preserves continuous segment-level memory; overlaps watching and thinking phases to enable concurrent perception/generation.

hf:2603.10899.task: Efficient KV cache management for long-context inference
hf:2603.10899.outputs: Pruned KV caches with importance scores
hf:2603.10899.key_results: 14.5x eviction cost reduction; outperforms expensive draft-generation methods at negligible overhead
hf:2603.10899.comments: Uses parameter-efficient modules to predict importance without explicit draft generation; achieves accuracy of costly approximations with heuristic efficiency.

hf:2603.10781.model: (probe-based VLM) Super Neurons on large VLMs
hf:2603.10781.key_results: Up to 5.10x speedup; improved accuracy with extreme early exiting from first layer at first token
hf:2603.10781.comments: Identifies scalar activations ('super neurons') in shallow LLM layers sufficient for accurate classifiers; avoids attention vector search complexity.

hf:2603.11863.task: Evaluating machine creativity in code generation
hf:2603.11863.key_results: Scaling improves combinatorial creativity but diminishing returns for exploration; larger models show convergence-by-scaling
hf:2603.11863.comments: CreativeBench defines creativity as product of quality and novelty; proposes EvoRePE inference-time steering to enhance divergence.

hf:2603.13131.task: Open-world embodied task learning via self-evolution
hf:2603.13131.key_results: Consistent improvements over static retrieval baselines on Minecraft MCU long-horizon suite
hf:2603.13131.comments: Couples fine-grained execution diagnosis with dual-track distillation (reusable skills + executable guardrails) in closed-loop without parameter updates.

hf:2603.12824.key_results: Retains 95.1% teacher quality; outperforms DSE-Qwen2 (2B) with 32x fewer parameters and 50x lower latency
hf:2603.12824.comments: Exploits query-document asymmetry via decoupled encoding; pointwise cosine alignment on query text outperforms ranking-based alternatives.

hf:2603.11749.task: Understanding LLM preference for correct information
hf:2603.11749.inputs: Synthetic math corpora with correct/incorrect rules
hf:2603.11749.key_results: 83.1% accuracy for correct at balanced data; truth bias largely disappears with coherent false rules
hf:2603.11749.comments: Compression-Consistency Principle: truth preference is side effect of compression and consistency, not intrinsic truth bias.

hf:2603.12935.task: Prompt-based bias mitigation in LLM recommendations
hf:2603.12935.key_results: Fairness improved up to 74% while retaining comparable effectiveness; may overrepresent specific demographics
hf:2603.12935.comments: First study on prompt-based debiasing for group fairness in LLMRecs; lightweight and user-accessible without weight access.

hf:2603.12916.task: Multivariate time series anomaly detection via attention queries
hf:2603.12916.key_results: Improved ranking quality and temporal localization on TSB-AD (17 datasets); detects dependency shifts beyond amplitude changes
hf:2603.12916.comments: Treats query evolution as predictable process; dual scoring (reconstruction + query mismatch) captures structural dependency shifts.

hf:2603.02133.outputs: Object-centric scene assets and simulator configuration
hf:2603.02133.key_results: Superior performance on ScanNet for visual fidelity and physical plausibility vs SOTA
hf:2603.02133.comments: Bridges perception-generation (Active Viewpoint Optimization) and generation-simulation (Scene Graph Synthesizer) to achieve physical plausibility.

hf:2603.12588.comments: Exploits rigid ship geometry as stable prior; disentangles modality-invariant identity features from modality-specific texture.

hf:2603.10926.model: (time-series detectors) Mixed classical and deep methods
hf:2603.10926.key_results: Lightweight classical detectors sustain coverage and accuracy under throughput constraints; several deep methods lose feasibility
hf:2603.10926.comments: ECoLAD introduces compute-reduction ladder with mechanical scaling rules to measure behavior under deployment-relevant CPU parallelism limits.

hf:2603.12533.comments: Hand Intent Tokens encode 3D keypoints to provide explicit spatial/temporal context for interpreting pointing intent.

hf:2603.09930.model: (Vision Transformer) Joint-angle motion representation with MaxSim
hf:2603.09930.inputs: Text descriptions and 3D motion skeleton sequences
hf:2603.09930.outputs: Aligned motion retrievals with token-wise correspondences
hf:2603.09930.key_results: Outperforms SOTA on HumanML3D and KIT-ML with interpretable fine-grained text-motion alignment
hf:2603.09930.comments: Maps joint-level features into pseudo-images for ViT compatibility; masked language modeling regularization fosters robust alignment.

hf:2603.11382.task: Detecting self-preservation objectives in autonomous agents
hf:2603.11382.model: (quantum-inspired) Quantum Boltzmann Machine (QBM) for latent analysis
hf:2603.11382.outputs: Entanglement entropy scores and objective classification
hf:2603.11382.key_results: 100% detection accuracy on gridworld; Delta=0.381 entanglement gap (p<0.001) between intrinsic vs instrumental continuation
hf:2603.11382.comments: UCIP uses von Neumann entropy to distinguish terminal continuation objectives from instrumental ones via latent statistical structure; does not measure consciousness.

hf:2603.12255.task: Streaming spatial understanding from long-horizon videos
hf:2603.12255.key_results: State-of-the-art on video spatial benchmarks; handles long-horizon scene videos with efficient large-chunk updates
hf:2603.12255.comments: Test-time training of fast weights is novel for streaming contexts, though computational overhead during inference may limit deployment.

hf:2603.12180.task: Assessing agentic reasoning over document collections
hf:2603.12180.outputs: Retrieved documents and answers with accuracy/effort tradeoff metrics
hf:2603.12180.key_results: Best agents match human accuracy but rely on brute-force search; ~20% gap to oracle performance persists
hf:2603.12180.comments: MADQA benchmark reveals agents lack genuine strategic planning despite high raw accuracy, pointing to fundamental reasoning deficits.

hf:2603.12201.task: Accelerating sparse attention via cross-layer index reuse
hf:2603.12201.inputs: Long-context LLM prefill and decode sequences
hf:2603.12201.outputs: Attention-weighted token selections with reduced computation
hf:2603.12201.key_results: 1.82× prefill speedup, 1.48× decode speedup; removes 75% of indexer computations with negligible quality loss
hf:2603.12201.comments: Clever exploitation of redundancy across layers; practical gains on production-scale models validate the approach.

hf:2603.10178.task: Reward modeling for computer-using agent evaluation
hf:2603.10178.outputs: Task success probability and temporal attribution
hf:2603.10178.key_results: 84.7% accuracy, 87.7% recall; outperforms GPT-4o and Gemini-3 Pro on cross-platform evaluation
hf:2603.10178.comments: Video-based rewards are method-agnostic and scalable; spatiotemporal token pruning elegantly handles high-resolution inputs.

hf:2603.11421.task: Cinematic camera control for multi-shot video generation
hf:2603.11421.inputs: Text descriptions and optional camera trajectories
hf:2603.11421.outputs: Multi-shot videos with globally aligned camera motions
hf:2603.11421.key_results: Superior cinematic aesthetics; bridges gap between unreliable text control and labor-intensive manual plotting
hf:2603.11421.comments: Data-centric approach with automated calibration pipeline is elegant; ShotVerse-Bench provides needed evaluation foundation.

hf:2603.12257.task: Multi-subject identity and omni-motion controlled video synthesis
hf:2603.12257.inputs: Subject appearances, global motion, local dynamics, camera movements
hf:2603.12257.outputs: High-quality multi-subject videos with precise motion control
hf:2603.12257.key_results: Superior identity preservation and motion controllability; latent identity reward learning mitigates degradation
hf:2603.12257.comments: Two-stage training with latent reward feedback is novel; group/role embeddings elegantly disentangle multi-subject scenes.

hf:2603.12056.task: Continual learning from experience and skills in multimodal agents
hf:2603.12056.outputs: Visually-grounded experiences and skills for tool use
hf:2603.12056.key_results: Consistent substantial improvements over baselines on five benchmarks; superior zero-shot generalization
hf:2603.12056.comments: Dual-stream knowledge extraction is well-motivated; grounding in visual context makes the approach practical for embodied agents.

hf:2603.12250.task: Deterministic video depth estimation with generative priors
hf:2603.12250.inputs: Video sequences from pretrained diffusion models
hf:2603.12250.outputs: Dense depth maps with sharp boundaries and temporal coherence
hf:2603.12250.key_results: State-of-the-art zero-shot performance; uses 163× less task-specific data than baselines
hf:2603.12250.comments: Repurposing diffusion timesteps as structural anchors is clever; latent manifold rectification effectively mitigates over-smoothing.

hf:2603.11593.task: Text-centric image editing with glyph guidance
hf:2603.11593.outputs: Edited images with modified, translated, or rearranged text
hf:2603.11593.key_results: Outperforms prior models; 330K training pairs across 15 languages; multilingual support
hf:2603.11593.comments: HTML-based automatic pipeline for data generation is scalable; multi-objective RL aligns competing objectives effectively.

hf:2603.12247.task: Robust reward modeling for faithful image editing and generation
hf:2603.12247.outputs: Reliability scores via Base-and-Bonus reward strategy
hf:2603.12247.key_results: Superior alignment with human judgment; FIRM-Qwen-Edit and FIRM-SD3.5 achieve substantial performance gains
hf:2603.12247.comments: Data curation pipelines for editing vs. generation are well-designed; CME and QMA reward decomposition is principled.

hf:2603.12245.task: Elastic latency-quality trade-offs in diffusion transformers
hf:2603.12245.inputs: Variable-sized images via learnable token sequence
hf:2603.12245.outputs: Generated images with dynamic compute budgets
hf:2603.12245.key_results: 35.3% FID and 39.6% FDD gains on ImageNet-512; generalizes across DiT variants
hf:2603.12245.comments: Minimal architectural modification (two cross-attention layers) enables strong generalization; importance-ordered latents are well-motivated.

hf:2603.12264.task: Evaluating discipline-informed reasoning in image editing
hf:2603.12264.outputs: Discipline reasoning, visual consistency, and logical readability scores
hf:2603.12264.key_results: Large performance gaps under implicit, knowledge-intensive settings; models struggle with domain-specific constraints
hf:2603.12264.comments: GRADE fills a gap by testing structured domain knowledge; multi-dimensional evaluation is comprehensive.

hf:2603.09970.task: Evaluating models' capacity for creative associative reasoning
hf:2603.09970.model: (LLM reasoning) frontier models including thinking models
hf:2603.09970.outputs: Paths connecting concepts with specificity and diversity metrics
hf:2603.09970.key_results: Strongest models achieve higher creative utility; thinking models not always most effective despite large token budgets
hf:2603.09970.comments: CREATE provides objective grading for open-ended creativity; result that reasoning scales don't monotonically help is noteworthy.

hf:2603.09160.task: Rubric-guided reinforcement learning for dense image captioning
hf:2603.09160.outputs: High-quality diverse captions with structured evaluation
hf:2603.09160.key_results: Highest win rates on CapArena; RubiCap-3B surpasses 7B counterpart; outperforms GPT-4V
hf:2603.09160.comments: LLM rubric writing for decomposed rewards is elegant; structured multi-faceted evaluation beats scalar rewards.

hf:2603.12267.task: Adaptive length video tokenization for efficient autoregressive generation
hf:2603.12267.outputs: Adaptive token sequences with quality-cost trade-offs
hf:2603.12267.key_results: 24.4% token savings vs. LARP; state-of-the-art class-to-video on UCF-101
hf:2603.12267.comments: Adaptive tokenization motivated by temporal complexity variation is sensible; video semantic encoders improve training.

hf:2603.12265.task: Unified streaming visual backbone for perception and action
hf:2603.12265.inputs: Diverse visual inputs (images, videos, robotic streams)
hf:2603.12265.outputs: Semantic, spatial, and temporal representations for reasoning and control
hf:2603.12265.key_results: Competitive performance across image/video probing, reconstruction, reasoning, and robotics (unseen at training)
hf:2603.12265.comments: Synergistic multi-task pretraining across 29 datasets enables versatility; frozen backbone generalization is impressive.

hf:2603.12252.task: Scaling chain-of-thought reasoning in diffusion models
hf:2603.12252.outputs: Generated solutions with iterative reasoning steps
hf:2603.12252.key_results: 92.1% average accuracy on spatial/logical tasks; 8.3pp improvement over strongest baseline
hf:2603.12252.comments: Iterative thought guidance with terminal grounding is well-motivated; endogenous reasoning beats invariant guidance paradigm.

hf:2603.12228.task: Discovering dense task-specific experts around pretrained weights
hf:2603.12228.outputs: Ensemble of specialized model variants via random sampling and voting
hf:2603.12228.key_results: Competitive with PPO and GRPO on large models; simple random sampling + majority voting effective
hf:2603.12228.comments: Finding that large pretrained models have high density of task-experts near initialization is surprising and actionable.

hf:2603.10444.task: Stabilizing FP4 quantized LLM training via mean bias removal
hf:2603.10444.model: (quantized transformer) FP4 (W4A4G4) training with bias conditioning
hf:2603.10444.inputs: Natural language text with rank-one mean bias
hf:2603.10444.key_results: Recovers most stability benefits of SVD-based methods with only reduction and standard quantization kernels
hf:2603.10444.comments: Theoretical insight that rank-one mean bias drives instability is elegant; hardware-efficient solution via mean subtraction.

hf:2603.11531.task: Real-time Gaussian splatting for mobile device rendering
hf:2603.11531.outputs: High-quality novel view images on edge devices
hf:2603.11531.key_results: Real-time rendering with compact model size; depth-aware order-independent rendering eliminates sorting bottleneck
hf:2603.11531.comments: Practical mobile deployment of 3DGS addresses real constraint; neural view-dependent enhancement mitigates transparency artifacts.

hf:2603.11327.task: In-context meta-RL with self-reflection for search
hf:2603.11327.key_results: 9.2%–19.3% relative improvements over baseline RL; strong generalization on OOD benchmarks
hf:2603.11327.comments: Cross-episode exploration via self-reflection is intuitive; multi-turn RL with turn-level credit assignment well-motivated.

hf:2603.11103.task: Synthesizing agentic trajectories for software understanding
hf:2603.11103.inputs: Static software repositories and dependency graphs
hf:2603.11103.outputs: Reconstructed planning, reasoning, and debugging trajectories
hf:2603.11103.key_results: Continuous pretraining on synthetic trajectories improves long-context understanding, coding, and agentic capabilities
hf:2603.11103.comments: Hypothesis that trajectories provide richer supervision than static code is novel; search-based CoT refinement ensures logical rigor.

hf:2603.10652.task: Robustness of video reasoning models to real-world perturbations
hf:2603.10652.model: (video VLM) Qwen2.5/3-VL, InternVL2.5 fine-tuned with ROVA
hf:2603.10652.inputs: Videos with weather, occlusion, and camera motion disturbances
hf:2603.10652.outputs: Reasoning predictions with robustness-aware consistency rewards
hf:2603.10652.key_results: 24%+ relative accuracy improvement; 9%+ reasoning improvement under perturbations; gains transfer to clean benchmarks
hf:2603.10652.comments: PVRBench with realistic perturbations reveals significant robustness gaps; difficulty-aware online training is practical.

hf:2603.10055.task: Pre-pre-training LLMs via synthetic neural cellular automata
hf:2603.10055.model: (transformer) LLM pretrained on NCA-generated data then natural language
hf:2603.10055.inputs: Synthetic spatiotemporal NCA sequences and natural language
hf:2603.10055.outputs: Improved language modeling and reasoning capabilities
hf:2603.10055.key_results: 164M NCA tokens improve downstream by 6%; outperforms 1.6B tokens of natural language; 1.6× faster convergence
hf:2603.10055.comments: Surprising result that synthetic non-linguistic data can match/exceed natural language pretraining; opens path for fully synthetic training.

hf:2603.12145.task: Automatic generation of high-performance RL environments
hf:2603.12145.outputs: High-performance JAX/Rust implementations with semantic equivalence
hf:2603.12145.key_results: EmuRust 1.5× PPO speedup; PokeJAX 22,320× over TypeScript; TCGJax 6.6× over Python reference
hf:2603.12145.comments: Recipe for agent-assisted translation with hierarchical verification is reusable; contamination control via novel environments.

hf:2603.11510.inputs: Text in 70 languages with region specialization
hf:2603.11510.key_results: SOTA translation quality and multilingual understanding at 3.35B params; region-specialized variants provided
hf:2603.11510.comments: Efficiency-centered scaling path with balanced language performance is pragmatic; region specialization addresses underserved languages.

hf:2603.10420.task: Industrial-grade all-in-one automatic speech recognition system
hf:2603.10420.inputs: Speech audio for ASR, VAD, LID, and punctuation
hf:2603.10420.outputs: Transcriptions, voice activity, language identification, and punctuation
hf:2603.10420.key_results: FireRedASR2: 2.89% CER Mandarin, 11.55% dialects; FireRedVAD: 97.57% F1; FireRedLID: 97.18% accuracy on FLEURS-82
hf:2603.10420.comments: Unified pipeline with lightweight modules (VAD 0.6M params) is practical; comprehensive multilingual/dialect support valuable.

hf:2603.10365.task: Principled latent design for diffusion models via vision priors
hf:2603.10365.model: (autoencoder for diffusion) GAE with VFM guidance
hf:2603.10365.inputs: High-resolution images with vision foundation model supervision
hf:2603.10365.outputs: Optimized latent representations for diffusion learning
hf:2603.10365.key_results: gFID 1.82 at 80 epochs, 1.31 at 800 epochs; balances compression, semantic depth, and reconstruction
hf:2603.10365.comments: Principled framework using VFM alignment and latent normalization (not KL) is elegant; strong empirical results validate design.

hf:2603.12057.task: Coarse-guided visual generation via weighted h-transform
hf:2603.12057.key_results: Effective across diverse image and video generation tasks; handles unknown forward operators
hf:2603.12057.comments: Noise-level-aware weight schedule elegantly balances guidance adherence and quality; training-free approach is practical.

hf:2603.11076.task: Scaling diversity in agentic task synthesis for tool use
hf:2603.11076.model: (LLM + RL) DIVE with reverse-derived task synthesis
hf:2603.11076.inputs: Real-world tools and diverse toolset combinations
hf:2603.11076.outputs: Executable, verifiable agentic tasks with rich tool-use patterns
hf:2603.11076.key_results: +22pp improvement on OOD benchmarks; +68pp over strongest 8B baseline; diversity scaling outperforms quantity scaling
hf:2603.11076.comments: Evidence-driven recipe inverting synthesis order is clever; controlled scaling axes (tool-pool, per-task variety) are principled.

hf:2603.07534.task: Controllable accent manipulation in multilingual TTS
hf:2603.07534.model: (TTS) Accent Vector via task vectors from cross-lingual fine-tuning
hf:2603.07534.inputs: Native speech of different language and target text
hf:2603.07534.outputs: Speech with controlled accent strength and composition
hf:2603.07534.key_results: Fine-grained accent control without accented training data; generalizes beyond English to multiple languages
hf:2603.07534.comments: Task vector approach for accent capture is creative; enables accent control via simple scaling/interpolation.

hf:2603.12246.task: Examining reasoning LLM judges in non-verifiable domains
hf:2603.12246.model: (LLM judge) reasoning vs. non-reasoning judges with RL training
hf:2603.12246.inputs: Gold-standard preference annotations for policy training
hf:2603.12246.outputs: Policies trained with different judge types; preference scores
hf:2603.12246.key_results: Reasoning judges avoid reward hacking; policies achieve strong performance but learn adversarial outputs
hf:2603.12246.comments: Finding that reasoning judges still lead to adversarial behavior is important caveat; highlights limits of judges alone.

hf:2603.11665.task: Multi-task RL for improved MLLM-as-a-Judge consistency
hf:2603.11665.inputs: Visual content and evaluation tasks across multiple domains
hf:2603.11665.outputs: Judgment predictions with improved consistency and human correlation
hf:2603.11665.key_results: Outperforms strong baselines in judgment consistency; robust generalization on OOD tasks
hf:2603.11665.comments: Multi-task RL for judge generalization is well-motivated; transfer to clean benchmarks validates approach.

hf:2603.11178.task: Distillation at the frontier of student model competence
hf:2603.11178.model: (transformer distillation) Paced with Beta-weighted pass-rate scheduling
hf:2603.11178.inputs: Student model on diverse problem difficulties
hf:2603.11178.outputs: Improved student model focused on zone of proximal development
hf:2603.11178.key_results: Significant gains with low forgetting on forward/reverse KL; two-stage synergy (forward→reverse) strongest
hf:2603.11178.comments: Theoretical proof of SNR-optimal Beta kernel is elegant; focus on proximal zone is intuitive and empirically effective.

hf:2603.12046.task: Analyzing modality contributions in audio-visual speech recognition
hf:2603.12046.inputs: Audio-visual speech with varying SNR levels
hf:2603.12046.outputs: SHAP-based modality contribution metrics (Global, Generative, Temporal)
hf:2603.12046.key_results: Models exhibit audio bias even under severe noise; modality balance evolves during decoding; SNR dominant factor
hf:2603.12046.comments: Shapley value analysis for multimodal systems is principled; reveals systematic audio bias motivating future work.

hf:2603.07865.task: Accelerating text-to-audio diffusion via semantic cache warm-starting
hf:2603.07865.model: (diffusion serving system) SoundWeaver with reference selection
hf:2603.07865.inputs: Text prompts and cached audio references
hf:2603.07865.key_results: 1.8–3.0× latency reduction with ~1K cache entries; preserves or improves perceptual quality
hf:2603.07865.comments: Training-free, model-agnostic approach is practical; quality-aware cache eviction maintains utility.

hf:2603.12089.task: Traceable black-box watermarking for federated language models
hf:2603.12089.inputs: Federated model instances distributed to clients
hf:2603.12089.outputs: Watermark verification and attribution to specific client
hf:2603.12089.key_results: Near 100% verification rates; robust to fine-tuning, pruning, quantization; 1–2% performance impact
hf:2603.12089.comments: Server-side, black-box traceability without client cooperation is practical; addresses critical FedLM vulnerability.

hf:2603.11653.model: (VLA + RL) Sequential fine-tuning with LoRA on VLAs
hf:2603.11653.outputs: Continually adapted VLA policy with minimal forgetting
hf:2603.11653.key_results: Simple Seq. FT + LoRA outperforms complex CRL methods; high plasticity with little forgetting; strong zero-shot generalization
hf:2603.11653.comments: Surprising finding that naive sequential fine-tuning works well for large VLAs; synergy of pretraining, LoRA, and on-policy RL.

hf:2603.11487.task: Understanding attention sinks in softmax transformers
hf:2603.11487.model: (transformer theory) softmax self-attention with trigger-conditional tasks
hf:2603.11487.outputs: Attention distributions and sink probability analysis
hf:2603.11487.key_results: Proves attention sinks are necessary in softmax models for trigger-conditional behavior; ReLU attention eliminates sinks
hf:2603.11487.comments: Theoretical proof of normalization-driven sink necessity is insightful; formalization of familiar intuition about probability simplices.

hf:2603.11045.task: 3D reconstruction of material properties via thermal measurements
hf:2603.11045.model: (neural field + differentiable solver) NeFTY for inverse problems
hf:2603.11045.outputs: 3D diffusivity field reconstruction with subsurface defect localization
hf:2603.11045.key_results: Significantly improves subsurface defect localization over baselines; hard constraint enforcement via differentiable physics
hf:2603.11045.comments: Discretize-then-optimize paradigm mitigates spectral bias; practical for non-destructive evaluation applications.

hf:2603.07988.task: Learning unified cooperative human-object interaction policy
hf:2603.07988.model: (humanoid control) TeamHOI with Transformer-based decentralized policy
hf:2603.07988.inputs: Local observations and teammate tokens for variable team sizes
hf:2603.07988.outputs: Physically plausible cooperative behaviors for carrying tasks
hf:2603.07988.key_results: High success rates on carrying tasks; single policy handles 2–8 agents; formation reward ensures stability
hf:2603.07988.comments: Masked Adversarial Motion Prior cleverly uses single-human motions for multi-agent training; scalability to variable team sizes impressive.

hf:2603.06922.task: Understanding nonlinear eigenspectrum dynamics in LLM FFNs
hf:2603.06922.inputs: FFN activations across layers and training steps
hf:2603.06922.outputs: Spectral entropy, participation ratio, and eigenvalue metrics
hf:2603.06922.key_results: FFN nonlinearities reinject variance; optimizer geometry modulates variance reinjection; signatures correlate with generalization
hf:2603.06922.comments: Lightweight eigenspectrum tracking reveals fundamental FFN dynamics; insights actionable for architectural and optimizer design.

hf:2603.05483.task: Benchmarking heterogeneous treatment effect estimation with censored outcomes
hf:2603.05483.model: (survival analysis methods) Causal Survival Forests, meta-learners, imputation
hf:2603.05483.inputs: Right-censored survival data with treatments and covariates
hf:2603.05483.outputs: HTE estimates evaluated under diverse causal assumptions
hf:2603.05483.key_results: First comprehensive benchmark across synthetic, semi-synthetic, real-world data; reveals performance gaps under assumption violations
hf:2603.05483.comments: SurvHTE-Bench fills methodological gap in survival HTE evaluation; modular design enables systematic method comparison.

hf:2602.24181.task: Learning modality-agnostic feature space across RGB, depth, segmentation
hf:2602.24181.model: (vision encoder) Omnivorous Vision Encoder fine-tuned from DINOv2
hf:2602.24181.inputs: Multi-modal inputs (RGB, depth, segmentation) of same scene
hf:2602.24181.key_results: Consistent powerful embeddings across modalities; retains discriminative semantics of frozen teacher
hf:2602.24181.comments: Dual objective (cross-modal alignment + distillation) elegantly balances consistency and semantic preservation.

hf:2603.10604.task: Real-time photorealism enhancement via lightweight image translation
hf:2603.10604.model: (GAN) HyPER-GAN U-Net generator with hybrid patch training
hf:2603.10604.key_results: Outperforms SOTA paired image translation in latency, realism, semantic robustness; hybrid training improves visual quality
hf:2603.10604.comments: Lightweight design for real-time inference is practical; hybrid patch strategy from real data improves consistency.

hf:2603.10125.task: 4D reconstruction of horses from monocular video
hf:2603.10125.model: (implicit representation) 4DEquine with spatio-temporal transformer and Gaussian avatar
hf:2603.10125.outputs: Dynamic pose/shape sequence and animatable 3D Gaussian avatar
hf:2603.10125.key_results: SOTA on APT36K and AiM datasets; disentangles motion and appearance; trains on synthetic data only
hf:2603.10125.comments: Disentanglement into motion and appearance sub-problems is elegant; synthetic datasets (VarenPoser, VarenTex) enable training.

hf:2603.07331.task: Causal attribution of coastal water degradation to industrial expansion
hf:2603.07331.inputs: Multi-decadal satellite ocean color records and industrial timeline
hf:2603.07331.outputs: Causal impact estimates of nickel processing on water clarity
hf:2603.07331.key_results: Significant deterioration in K_d(490) after IMIP hyper-expansion; satellite-derived land cover corroborates timing
hf:2603.07331.comments: Satellite-based quasi-experimental framework is transferable for coastal impact assessment; demonstrates quantifiable marine cost of industrialization.

hf:2603.12572.task: Evaluating memory embeddings for long-horizon retrieval
hf:2603.12572.inputs: Text queries for episodic, dialogue, semantic, and procedural memory retrieval
hf:2603.12572.key_results: 22 datasets, 193 tasks; larger models don't always perform better; LMEB orthogonal to MTEB
hf:2603.12572.comments: Fills important gap showing traditional passage retrieval benchmarks don't transfer to complex memory tasks.

hf:2603.13023.task: Training software engineering agents at scale
hf:2603.13023.inputs: GitHub repositories, code editing tasks, test execution feedback
hf:2603.13023.key_results: 62.4% (32B) and 66.0% (72B) on SWE-bench Verified; +12pts on math, +5pts on science OOD
hf:2603.13023.comments: $1.47M investment in infrastructure reflects extreme cost-benefit tradeoff for reproducible SWE evaluation.

hf:2603.12648.task: Improving text-to-image flow model alignment via preference optimization
hf:2603.12648.inputs: Text prompts and generated image samples
hf:2603.12648.outputs: Optimized image samples with improved alignment
hf:2603.12648.key_results: Superior alignment over SOTA methods through multi-view reward mapping
hf:2603.12648.comments: Dense condition augmentation provides richer optimization signals without regenerating expensive samples.

hf:2603.12310.task: Closed-loop video quality improvement via agent critique
hf:2603.12310.model: (agentic VLM) multi-agent framework with Vision-Language Model
hf:2603.12310.inputs: Video generation outputs and visual quality questions
hf:2603.12310.comments: Treats VLM critiques as semantic gradients enabling black-box optimization without white-box access.

hf:2603.12634.task: Budget-aware multi-hop reasoning for LLM agents
hf:2603.12634.model: (transformer) LLM backbone with tree search inference
hf:2603.12634.inputs: Multi-hop QA queries with token/tool budget constraints
hf:2603.12634.outputs: Answers via dynamic search tree with pruned trajectories
hf:2603.12634.key_results: Outperforms baseline at 4× resource allocation under strict budget constraints; ≥1-ε convergence guarantee
hf:2603.12634.comments: Residual value predictor addressing LLM overconfidence is elegant; training-free makes deployment practical.

hf:2603.16790.inputs: natural language descriptions of programming tasks in specialized domains
hf:2603.16790.outputs: code solutions for chip design, GPU kernels, embedded systems, compiler optimization, and 3D modeling
hf:2603.16790.key_results: competitive performance on 14 general code benchmarks and strong baselines on 9 industrial benchmarks; extends context from 8K to 128K tokens
hf:2603.16790.comments: Notable for combining general pretraining with domain-specific annealing and execution-grounded verification, addressing a real gap in industrial code generation.

hf:2603.15726.task: Complex long-horizon reasoning for research tasks
hf:2603.15726.inputs: user queries and tool APIs for open-web research, scientific reasoning, and financial analysis
hf:2603.15726.outputs: structured reasoning plans with verified intermediate steps and final answers
hf:2603.15726.key_results: state-of-the-art performance on deep research tasks with local and global-level verification; open-source 1.7-mini variant available
hf:2603.15726.comments: Integration of verification into reasoning is commendable, though the specific performance metrics relative to prior work are not quantified in the abstract.

hf:2603.16870.task: Understanding reasoning mechanisms in video generation models
hf:2603.16870.inputs: prompts or conditioning signals for video generation tasks requiring reasoning
hf:2603.16870.outputs: generated video frames with reasoning across diffusion denoising steps
hf:2603.16870.key_results: identified Chain-of-Steps (CoS) as primary reasoning mechanism instead of Chain-of-Frames; ensemble latent trajectories improve performance
hf:2603.16870.comments: Provides valuable mechanistic insights into how diffusion models reason, but the practical improvements from proposed training-free strategies are not quantified.

hf:2603.16871.task: Interactive 3D gaming world generation with precise action control
hf:2603.16871.inputs: user actions represented as 6-DoF camera poses in Lie algebra; historical observations indexed by global camera pose
hf:2603.16871.outputs: video frames of interactive gaming environment with 3D spatial consistency over long horizons
hf:2603.16871.key_results: substantially outperforms state-of-the-art in action controllability and 3D spatial consistency; introduces 3,000-minute authentic gameplay dataset with camera trajectories
hf:2603.16871.comments: Clever use of camera pose as unifying geometric representation is elegant, though quantitative comparisons on standard metrics are absent from abstract.

hf:2603.13366.task: Mitigating hallucinations in visual question answering by MLRMs
hf:2603.13366.inputs: images and questions; token probability distributions during high-entropy reasoning stages
hf:2603.13366.outputs: answers with reduced hallucinations via entropy-aware decoding
hf:2603.13366.key_results: LEAD strategy effectively mitigates hallucinations across multiple MLLMs and benchmarks; uses probability-weighted embeddings under high entropy
hf:2603.13366.comments: Interesting approach leveraging entropy patterns in transition words, but specific quantitative improvements are not provided in abstract.

hf:2603.16448.task: Text-to-SQL parsing with unknown database schemas
hf:2603.16448.model: (RL with GRPO) agent-based system with LLM backbone
hf:2603.16448.inputs: natural language queries; access to unknown schemas via tool calls
hf:2603.16448.outputs: executable SQL queries with metadata verification
hf:2603.16448.key_results: 30.6% absolute improvement for 4B variant, 16.6% for 8B; matches schema-prefilled baselines without pre-loaded metadata
hf:2603.16448.comments: Dual-Track GRPO with token-level masked advantages is novel; 9.9% relative improvement over standard GRPO demonstrates effective credit assignment.

hf:2603.16856.task: Continuous online improvement of language models from deployment experience
hf:2603.16856.inputs: interaction trajectories from real-world deployment; user-side experience
hf:2603.16856.outputs: improved model parameters via on-policy context distillation
hf:2603.16856.key_results: consistent improvements over iterations; enhanced task accuracy and token efficiency while preserving OOD performance on text-based games
hf:2603.16856.comments: Clean separation of knowledge extraction and parameter consolidation is appealing, but experiments are limited to game environments rather than broader deployment scenarios.

hf:2603.08262.task: Evaluating LLM agents for real-world financial tool use
hf:2603.08262.model: (LLM agents) various foundation models with financial tool APIs
hf:2603.08262.inputs: financial queries requiring tool execution; 760 executable financial tools
hf:2603.08262.outputs: evaluation scores on timeliness, intent type, and regulatory alignment; FATR baseline results
hf:2603.08262.key_results: FinToolBench comprises 760 executable tools with 295 tool-required queries; introduces finance-critical evaluation dimensions beyond binary success
hf:2603.08262.comments: Valuable contribution addressing real-world finance domain, though this is primarily a benchmark paper without strong baseline results reported.

hf:2603.14465.task: Evaluating step-level effectiveness in tool-using agent trajectories
hf:2603.14465.inputs: tool-augmented trajectories with 8,509 human-labeled step annotations
hf:2603.14465.outputs: per-step correctness labels and agent quality metrics
hf:2603.14465.key_results: identified key challenges: weaker models show inflated step correctness due to early termination; process signals complement outcome supervision for test-time scaling
hf:2603.14465.comments: First benchmark dedicated to step-level evaluation in realistic tool use; ternary labeling scheme and error propagation rules improve annotation reliability.

hf:2603.16859.task: Evaluating audio-visual social interactivity in omni-modal models
hf:2603.16859.inputs: audio-visual dialogue with speaker cues and interruption opportunities
hf:2603.16859.outputs: speaker identification, interruption timing, and natural interruption generation
hf:2603.16859.key_results: decoupling between perceptual accuracy and interaction generation quality across 12 OLMs; significant variance in social-interaction capabilities
hf:2603.16859.comments: Operationalizes underexplored dimension of conversational AI; reveals important gap between understanding and appropriate social response generation.

hf:2603.16869.task: 3D part segmentation via repurposing 3D generative models
hf:2603.16869.model: (3D generative model) pretrained native 3D generator with segmentation adapter
hf:2603.16869.outputs: part segmentation masks via distinctive part colorization
hf:2603.16869.key_results: 40% improvement on interactive part segmentation, 15% on full segmentation; uses only 0.32% of labeled training data versus prior work
hf:2603.16869.comments: Clever repurposing of pretrained priors for a discriminative task; significant data efficiency gain validates transferability of 3D generative models.

hf:2603.16844.task: Monocular video SLAM with dense correspondence matching
hf:2603.16844.model: (vision foundation model + Gaussian splatting) M³ system combining multi-view foundation model matching with SLAM
hf:2603.16844.outputs: camera poses and 3D scene reconstruction via Gaussian splatting
hf:2603.16844.key_results: 64.3% ATE RMSE reduction vs VGGT-SLAM 2.0; 2.11 dB PSNR improvement over ARTDECO on ScanNet++
hf:2603.16844.comments: Augments multi-view foundation models with dedicated matching head for fine-grained correspondences; addresses critical bottleneck in geometric optimization.

hf:2603.16189.task: SVG generation with structured reasoning and code refinement
hf:2603.16189.model: (vision-language model with chain-of-thought) CTRL-S using GRPO and multi-reward optimization
hf:2603.16189.outputs: SVG code with group-level structure and visual SVG rendering
hf:2603.16189.key_results: higher task success rates, superior code quality, and exceptional visual fidelity; multi-reward framework incorporates DINO, image-text similarity, format, and efficiency rewards
hf:2603.16189.comments: Introduction of chain-of-thought reasoning for SVG generation is novel; multi-reward optimization with GRPO demonstrates effective handling of competing objectives.

hf:2603.09821.task: Automating LLM evaluation from natural-language requests
hf:2603.09821.inputs: natural-language evaluation requests; optional human edits and rollback
hf:2603.09821.outputs: executable evaluation workflows with task-aware metrics and decision-oriented reporting
hf:2603.09821.key_results: end-to-end evaluation execution from diverse NL requests with minimal user effort; human-in-the-loop checkpoints preserve auditability
hf:2603.09821.comments: Addresses real pain point of heterogeneous evaluation codebases; focus on reproducibility and human oversight is commendable for industrial settings.

hf:2603.15929.task: Formal verification of plasma physics equilibrium in Vlasov-Maxwell-Landau system
hf:2603.15929.model: (AI reasoning + symbolic proof) Gemini DeepThink + Claude + Aristotle prover + Lean 4 kernel
hf:2603.15929.outputs: fully formal Lean 4 proofs verified by kernel
hf:2603.15929.key_results: complete formalization of VML equilibrium characterization; 229 human prompts, 213 commits, $200 cost, 10 days with one mathematician
hf:2603.15929.comments: Remarkable demonstration of AI-assisted formal verification; detailed documentation of failure modes (hypothesis creep, definition bugs, agent avoidance) provides valuable lessons for future work.

hf:2603.14152.task: Skeletal control for native 3D object generation
hf:2603.14152.model: (3D diffusion model) frozen generative backbone with lightweight SK-Adapter
hf:2603.14152.inputs: 3D skeleton (joint coordinates and topology) as structural control signal
hf:2603.14152.outputs: high-quality 3D meshes with precise skeletal articulation and preserved texture
hf:2603.14152.key_results: robust structural control while preserving geometry and texture quality; enables local 3D editing via skeletal guidance; Objaverse-TMS dataset released with 24k samples
hf:2603.14152.comments: Treating 3D skeleton as first-class control signal is intuitive; lightweight adapter design preserves generative priors while enabling precise manipulation.

hf:2603.15600.task: Process monitoring and failure detection for long-horizon robotic manipulation
hf:2603.15600.model: (video MLLM with RL) PRIMO R1 (7B), transforms passive observer to active critic
hf:2603.15600.inputs: video sequences anchored between initial and current state; optional task goal
hf:2603.15600.outputs: progress estimation and failure detection via chain-of-thought reasoning
hf:2603.15600.key_results: 50% reduction in MAE vs specialized baselines; 67.0% accuracy on RoboFail, surpassing OpenAI o1 by 6.0%; strong zero-shot generalization
hf:2603.15600.comments: Clever use of structured temporal input anchoring; outcome-based RL for eliciting process reasoning is an effective way to shift from passive recognition to active evaluation.

hf:2603.16867.task: Efficient on-device reasoning for small language models via adapter tuning and budget forcing
hf:2603.16867.model: (adapter-based) LoRA adapters on small LLMs (Qwen2.5-7B) with dynamic switching
hf:2603.16867.inputs: prompts requiring reasoning; budget constraints for token generation and memory
hf:2603.16867.outputs: concise reasoning traces and final answers optimized for edge deployment
hf:2603.16867.key_results: practical reasoning on mobile with strict resource constraints; dynamic adapter switching and KV-cache sharing reduce overhead; 20x inference speedup potential
hf:2603.16867.comments: Practical contribution addressing real constraint of on-device deployment; budget forcing via RL to compress reasoning while maintaining accuracy is pragmatic.

hf:2603.15653.task: Long-context information extraction via self-reflective program search
hf:2603.15653.model: (recursive decomposition) SRLM augmenting Recursive Language Models with uncertainty-aware self-reflection
hf:2603.15653.inputs: long-context documents; prompts requiring reasoning over extended context
hf:2603.15653.outputs: answers derived from recursively decomposed context interactions
hf:2603.15653.key_results: up to 22% improvement over RLM under same time budget; self-reflection (consistency, reasoning length, confidence) outperforms recursion alone across diverse benchmarks
hf:2603.15653.comments: Important finding that self-reflection is more critical than recursion itself; demonstrates that heuristic signals can guide effective long-context handling.

hf:2603.16861.task: Zero-shot sim-to-real transfer for robot manipulation
hf:2603.16861.model: (vision-language policy) MolmoBot based on Molmo2 with flow-matching action head; plus Pi0-replica and SPOC variants
hf:2603.16861.inputs: visual observations from robot cameras; task descriptions
hf:2603.16861.outputs: continuous action commands for articulated manipulation and mobile manipulation
hf:2603.16861.key_results: 79.2% success on tabletop pick-and-place in real world; outperforms π₀.₅ at 39.2%; zero-shot transfer to unseen objects without real-world fine-tuning; 1.8M synthetic trajectories
hf:2603.16861.comments: Strong result demonstrating that procedural sim-to-real gap can be bridged with sufficient scale and diversity; release of 1.8M trajectories and open-source pipeline valuable for community.

hf:2603.16343.task: 3D human pose estimation from LiDAR under human-object interactions
hf:2603.16343.model: (point cloud network) HOIL framework with contrastive learning and attention pooling
hf:2603.16343.inputs: LiDAR point clouds of humans interacting with objects
hf:2603.16343.outputs: 3D keypoint coordinates for human pose; temporal refinement via contact cues
hf:2603.16343.key_results: HOIL effectively resolves spatial ambiguity and class imbalance in interaction regions; robust pose estimation in cluttered backgrounds; contact-aware temporal refinement improves per-frame predictions
hf:2603.16343.comments: Well-motivated approach addressing two concrete challenges (spatial ambiguity, class imbalance) in autonomous driving context; temporal refinement is practical addition.

hf:2603.16184.task: Multilingual automatic speech recognition for Singapore languages
hf:2603.16184.model: (fine-tuned ASR) Qwen3-ASR-0.6B and 1.7B with balanced language sampling
hf:2603.16184.inputs: speech audio in English, Mandarin, Tamil, Malay
hf:2603.16184.outputs: transcribed text with implicit language identification from audio
hf:2603.16184.key_results: Polyglot-Lion-1.7B achieves 14.85 average error rate competitive with 6x larger MERaLiON-2-10B (14.32); 20x faster inference; $81 training cost vs $18,862
hf:2603.16184.comments: Impressive efficiency gains through balanced fine-tuning strategy; elimination of language tags forces implicit learning, improving cross-lingual generalization.

hf:2603.15854.task: Fast and memory-efficient categorical sampling for LLM decoding
hf:2603.15854.model: (GPU kernel) fused sampling primitive integrating into LM-head matmul
hf:2603.15854.inputs: logits tile-by-tile on-chip; Gumbel noise injection
hf:2603.15854.outputs: exact categorical samples without materializing full logits tensor in HBM
hf:2603.15854.key_results: up to 19% reduction in time per output token in vLLM; speeds up kernel-level decode across H100, H200, B200, B300 GPUs
hf:2603.15854.comments: Elegant kernel-level optimization exploiting argmax properties; demonstrates that exact sampling can be efficiently fused into matmul without approximation.

hf:2603.15309.task: Evaluating LLM tool use under complex constraints
hf:2603.15309.model: (LLM agents) nine state-of-the-art models in thinking and non-thinking modes
hf:2603.15309.inputs: tool-use scenarios with average 7 constraint types; prompts exceeding 4,500 tokens; 12 constraint categories across 4 dimensions
hf:2603.15309.outputs: execution traces with step-level constraint violation validation
hf:2603.15309.key_results: no model achieves >20% completion rate under strict constraint adherence; models violate constraints in >50% of cases; limited self-refinement capability even with feedback
hf:2603.15309.comments: Sobering benchmark revealing critical gap in constraint compliance; dimensional taxonomy (resource, behavior, toolset, response) provides useful structure for future improvements.

hf:2603.16099.task: 3D scene generation with cross-view consistency via unified 3D representation
hf:2603.16099.model: (3D diffusion) OneWorld using 3D Unified Representation Autoencoder (3D-URAE) with pretrained 3D foundation models
hf:2603.16099.inputs: scene descriptions or conditions; token-level cross-view correspondence loss
hf:2603.16099.outputs: high-quality 3D scenes with superior cross-view appearance and geometric consistency
hf:2603.16099.key_results: superior cross-view consistency vs 2D-based methods; token-level CVC consistency loss enforces structural alignment; Manifold-Drift Forcing mitigates train-inference bias
hf:2603.16099.comments: Operating diffusion directly in unified 3D space addresses fundamental limitation of 2D latent approaches; augmentation of geometry-centric models with appearance and semantics is principled.

hf:2603.13715.task: Quantifying capitalist land enclosure via information-geometric and statistical-mechanical analysis
hf:2603.13715.model: (information geometry + Markov chains) Fisher-Rao geodesics on Marxian probability simplex; percolation and fractal analysis
hf:2603.13715.inputs: Sentinel-2 LULC satellite data (2017-2024) at 10m resolution; land-use fractions (Commons, Agrarian, Capital)
hf:2603.13715.outputs: quantitative characterization of spatial transformation velocity, topology, irreversibility; percolation thresholds and fractal dimensions
hf:2603.13715.key_results: transformation pulse of 0.405 rad/yr (2019-2020); absorption times of 46.0 yrs (cropland) and 38.1 yrs (tree cover); built-area self-retention 96.4%; urban boundary fractal dimension 1.316→1.397
hf:2603.13715.comments: Novel application of mathematical physics tools to political economy; information-geometric approach to quantifying enclosure is creative but requires deep domain expertise to validate causal claims.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44097-0.task: Analytical solutions for soliton dynamics in nonlinear optical media
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44097-0.model: (theoretical) Fokas–Lenells equation with generalized quadratic-cubic self-phase modulation and nonlinear dispersion
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44097-0.inputs: Perturbed quiescent optical solitons; generalized self-phase modulation and chromatic dispersion parameters
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44097-0.outputs: Diverse family of soliton solutions (dark, periodic, singular, dark-singular, singular-periodic structures); spectral and temporal profiles
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44097-0.key_results: Modified extended tanh method generates richest compact solution spectrum; selected soliton profiles exhibit soliton production, frequency shifting, and pulse compression phenomena
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44097-0.comments: The work provides analytical rather than numerical solutions, making it valuable for understanding fundamental soliton behavior, though practical validation in real fiber systems remains unaddressed.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43896-9.task: Optimization of ferroelectric FET memory window through oxygen control
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43896-9.model: (experiment) IGZO/HfZrO₂ ferroelectric field-effect transistor with hafnium-oxide-based ferroelectric
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43896-9.inputs: Oxygen partial pressure (P_O₂) during IGZO channel deposition (0–20%); device fabrication and characterization
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43896-9.outputs: Memory window (V); oxygen vacancy concentration; interfacial defect density; polarization switching dynamics
