nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43896-9.key_results: Optimized 5% P_O₂ yields maximum memory window of 1.85 V; minimized interfacial defects while maintaining carrier density; accelerated polarization switching confirmed by nucleation-limited analysis
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43896-9.comments: This is a practical materials engineering study addressing a known interface bottleneck, though long-term reliability metrics (endurance cycles, retention time) are mentioned but not quantified.

nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70589-8.task: Characterizing spin relaxation and coherence in topological defects of dimerized spin chains
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70589-8.model: (theory) dimerized spin chains with edge states
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70589-8.inputs: Topological defect (edge state) properties, temperature, phonon interactions
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70589-8.outputs: Electron spin resonance relaxation times, coherence times, homogeneous broadening
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70589-8.key_results: Phonon-bottlenecked relaxation at low T, chain dimerization gap governs high-T relaxation; inter edge-state dipolar field reduced by exchange coupling
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70589-8.comments: Bridges fundamental spin dynamics with practical quantum device design, though experimental validation on real materials would strengthen claims.

nature:10.1038/s42005-026-02586-8.task: Simulating real-time jet energy loss in high-energy nuclear scattering
nature:10.1038/s42005-026-02586-8.inputs: Propagating probe state, dense target medium density
nature:10.1038/s42005-026-02586-8.outputs: Probe energy loss rate, entanglement entropy, probe-medium mixing
nature:10.1038/s42005-026-02586-8.key_results: Linear energy loss scaling with path length; three regimes: ballistic, intermediate excitation, black-disk limit; evidence of probe-medium quantum mixing
nature:10.1038/s42005-026-02586-8.comments: Important for understanding quark-gluon plasma, but 1+1-d model is simplified; scalability to quantum simulators discussed but not demonstrated.

nature:10.1038/s41567-026-03213-7.task: Emulating Bose-Hubbard model with long-range hopping using exciton arrays
nature:10.1038/s41567-026-03213-7.outputs: Many-body sub-radiance, radiative dissipation rate, coherence, Mott phase properties
nature:10.1038/s41567-026-03213-7.key_results: Algebraic slowdown of radiative dissipation signals long-range hopping; threshold increase in temporal coherence for Mott-like phases; exciton condensation in single sub-radiant state
nature:10.1038/s41567-026-03213-7.comments: Elegant platform combining condensed matter and quantum optics; sub-radiance observation is novel but interpretation of effective Bose-Hubbard parameters could be more explicit.

nature:10.1038/s41567-026-03216-4.task: Identifying mechanisms of strange metallicity in kagome metal
nature:10.1038/s41567-026-03216-4.inputs: Magnetic field, temperature, kagome lattice geometry
nature:10.1038/s41567-026-03216-4.outputs: Spectral features (zero-bias peak-dip), quasiparticle collapse, orbital-driven localization signature
nature:10.1038/s41567-026-03216-4.key_results: Zero-bias peak from compact molecular orbitals via destructive quantum interference; emergent f-shell-like moments in d-electron kagome metal; quasiparticle collapse across Brillouin zone
nature:10.1038/s41567-026-03216-4.comments: Provides microscopic insight into universal strange metallicity through orbital localization mechanism, though direct causality between orbital features and strange metal behavior requires stronger evidence.

nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70371-w.task: Enhancing organic phosphorescence via spin-orbit and transition dipole cooperation
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70371-w.model: (molecular design) vertical substituents perpendicular to conjugated plane
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70371-w.inputs: Main-group element substituent through-space position, conjugated molecular structure
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70371-w.outputs: Phosphorescence quantum yield, emission efficiency across visible wavelengths
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70371-w.key_results: Vertical substitution enables cooperative spin-orbit and transition dipole effects; phosphorescence efficiency reaches fluorescence levels across visible spectrum
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70371-w.comments: Novel design principle distinct from horizontal substitution used for fluorescence; mechanism is plausible but lacks quantitative efficiency values and comparison to state-of-art phosphorescent materials.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44218-9.task: Improving free-surface detection in 3D moving particle semi-implicit (MPS) method
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44218-9.model: (numerical method) Moving Particle Semi-Implicit with particle density criteria
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44218-9.inputs: Particle positions, relative position divergence (RPD), surface normal vectors
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44218-9.outputs: Surface particle classification, pressure field, surface-boundary identification
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44218-9.key_results: RPD + NV method reduces false negatives/positives; smoother pressure fields without computational overhead; accurate detection on convex, concave, and cavity boundaries
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44218-9.comments: Well-executed incremental improvement with clear validation; practical for MPS applications but represents engineering optimization rather than fundamental advance.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43327-9.task: Predicting heat transfer in Maxwell hybrid nanofluids using neural networks
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43327-9.model: (hybrid) numerical PDE solver + artificial neural network (Levenberg-Marquardt)
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43327-9.inputs: Magnetic field strength, Biot number, velocity slip, thermal radiation, nanofluid parameters
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43327-9.outputs: Velocity and temperature distributions, heat transfer rates, neural network predictions
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43327-9.key_results: MSE as low as 6.92×10⁻¹² for velocity gradients, 1.47×10⁻¹¹ for temperature; R≈1 across all subsets; thermal radiation and Biot number enhance heat transfer
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43327-9.comments: Strong ANN performance but limited novelty; framework is standard multilayer perceptron applied to standard boundary-layer problem; hybrid nanofluid benefits are modest.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44737-5.task: Analyzing refrigeration performance of foam box insulation in aircraft cargo
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44737-5.model: (finite element) energy balance and temperature field simulation
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44737-5.inputs: Aircraft cabin pressure, convective heat transfer coefficient, initial ice mass
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44737-5.outputs: Temperature field inside foam box, refrigeration effectiveness, time to maintain target temperature
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44737-5.key_results: Low-pressure environment degrades cooling effectiveness compared to ground; ice amount can be adjusted to compensate; refrigeration performance inversely proportional to convective coefficient
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44737-5.comments: Practical engineering analysis addressing real operational concern, but findings are unsurprising and optimization strategy is ad-hoc rather than systematic.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44091-6.task: Detecting precursor patterns before ice shock fracture events
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44091-6.model: (statistical analysis) ice deformation measurements with topological pattern analysis
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44091-6.inputs: Continuous ice deformation measurements, statistical functional derivatives
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44091-6.outputs: Temporal evolution of statistical patterns, precursor signatures, time-to-failure prediction
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44091-6.key_results: Transition from stochastic to deterministic behavior; earliest precursors ~1 hour before event; distinct precursor groups at tens of minutes and final minutes; progressive synchronization of deformation
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44091-6.comments: Novel application of statistical/topological methods to fracture prediction; results suggest real predictive potential but sample size and statistical significance unclear.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42509-9.task: Establishing field enhancement bounds in transformation optics via étendue conservation
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42509-9.inputs: Coordinate transformation, geometric area-compression ratio, optical impedance
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42509-9.outputs: Maximum average intensity, radiance, étendue conservation constraints
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42509-9.key_results: Maximum intensity limited solely by geometric area-compression ratio independent of material; Liouville theorem enforces phase-space volume preservation; applies to zero-index, null, and illusion devices
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42509-9.comments: Elegant theoretical framework with fundamental implications; metric-based explanation is satisfying but practical utility for design remains to be demonstrated.

nature:10.1038/s41524-026-02023-y.task: Developing system-specific machine learning interatomic potentials efficiently
nature:10.1038/s41524-026-02023-y.model: (machine learning) MACE fine-tuning + NEP distillation workflow
nature:10.1038/s41524-026-02023-y.inputs: Few hundred additional DFT calculations, pretrained MACE model, target system
nature:10.1038/s41524-026-02023-y.outputs: Fine-tuned MACE model, distilled NEP model, large-scale MD trajectories
nature:10.1038/s41524-026-02023-y.key_results: Single-shot workflow significantly accelerates MLIP development; fine-tuned MACE inherits pretrained stability; NEP distilled from fine-tuned MACE achieves competitive accuracy with minimal DFT data
nature:10.1038/s41524-026-02023-y.comments: Practical contribution to ML workflow efficiency; demonstrates effective transfer learning strategy but scope limited to SSE applications.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43994-8.task: Evaluating C60 fullerene nanofluid for transformer cooling and insulation
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43994-8.model: (experiment + simulation) transformer oil with C60 nanoparticles; natural convection model
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43994-8.inputs: C60 concentration (0.004% w/V), temperature, transformer loading
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43994-8.outputs: Thermal conductivity, dielectric breakdown, flash point, temperature rise, heat circulation
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43994-8.key_results: AC breakdown voltage increased 65% with negligible viscosity/density/conductivity changes; flash point decreased; slight temperature decrease in transformer; nanofluid met EN 60076-2:2011 standard
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43994-8.comments: Comprehensive experimental and industrial validation; practical benefits modest and trade-offs (lower flash point) acknowledged; unconventional nano-functionalization method is interesting.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43858-1.task: Optimizing copper rod insertion for enhancing PCM melting in hemispherical geometry
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43858-1.model: (finite element) ANSYS Fluent enthalpy-porosity method for paraffin wax (RT42)
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43858-1.inputs: Copper rod length (0-30 mm), hemispherical cell geometry, initial temperature
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43858-1.outputs: Melting time, temperature distribution, convective currents, melting rate
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43858-1.key_results: Melting time reduced from 300 min (no rod) to 90 min (30 mm rod, 70% reduction); melting rate increased 233%; more homogeneous temperature distributions; stronger convection
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43858-1.comments: Clear quantitative improvements and systematic parametric study; however, analysis is limited to single PCM and geometry; scalability to other materials/shapes unclear.

nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70822-4.task: Enhancing surface-enhanced Raman spectroscopy activity at high temperature via hot-hole transfer
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70822-4.model: (experiment) Au-TiO2 nanoarrays SERS substrates with 785 nm excitation
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70822-4.inputs: Temperature (22-180°C), 785 nm photon-induced hot-hole transfer conditions
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70822-4.outputs: Raman signal intensity, SERS activity, molecular detection sensitivity
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70822-4.key_results: 11.41× signal enhancement at 180°C vs 22°C; mechanism: heat-assisted hot-hole transfer from Au to TiO2; enables high-temperature chemical analysis
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70822-4.comments: Unexpected anomalous temperature enhancement is intriguing; heat-assisted hot-hole mechanism is plausible but mechanism requires deeper theoretical characterization.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44212-1.task: Characterizing phonon frequency comb formation near Einstein mode in InSiTe₃
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44212-1.model: (experiment) polarization-resolved Raman spectroscopy on layered Van der Waals compound
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44212-1.inputs: Temperature (room temp to below 200 K), laser excitation at mode frequencies
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44212-1.outputs: Phonon frequency comb structure, anharmonic coupling strength, higher-order excitations
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44212-1.key_results: Self-organized frequency-domain structure (coherent-like state) near 500 cm⁻¹ A₁g mode; strong phonon-phonon coupling; anomalous temperature dependence around 200 K; higher-order excitations in phonon DOS gap
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44212-1.comments: Rare observation of phonon frequency comb; intrinsic material properties enable emergence; exceptional anharmonicity requires explanation of microscopic origin.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42922-0.task: Establishing structural duality between Schrödinger and Carroll-Schrödinger equations
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42922-0.model: (theory) Carrollian limit (c→0) quantum mechanics in 1+1 dimensions
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42922-0.inputs: Potential functions, initial wavefunctions, coordinate/time parameters
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42922-0.outputs: Shared solutions, coordinate transformations, probability densities and currents
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42922-0.key_results: Carroll-Schrödinger structural mirror of Schrödinger (1st order space, 2nd order time); any Carrollian problem maps to equivalent Schrödinger via explicit transformation; probability conservation in spatial evolution
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42922-0.comments: Elegant mathematical result establishing deep symmetry; extreme relativistic limits often produce unintuitive physics—practical applications to quantum systems remain speculative.

nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70467-3.task: Developing foundation model for crystal property prediction via symmetry-informed representation
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70467-3.model: (machine learning) CLOUD transformer with Symmetry-Consistent Ordered Parameter Encoding (SCOPE)
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70467-3.inputs: Crystal structure (symmetry, Wyckoff positions, composition), target properties
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70467-3.outputs: Property predictions, temperature-dependent properties (with Debye model integration)
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70467-3.key_results: Competitive performance on diverse material properties; strong scaling with data/model size; physics-informed approach enables thermodynamically consistent predictions; phonon-related properties predicted without additional data
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70467-3.comments: Well-motivated framework integrating symmetry and physics; pre-training on 6M crystals demonstrates scalability; Debye model integration is elegant but limited to phonon properties.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44437-0.task: Designing multifunctional metasurface with simultaneous polarization conversion and bandpass filtering
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44437-0.model: (metamaterial) bi-anisotropic omega metasurface combining polarization-converter + frequency-selective surface
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44437-0.inputs: Incident wave direction (±Z), polarization state, frequency
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44437-0.outputs: Reflected/transmitted polarization, bandpass transmission, insertion loss, cross-polarization conversion
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44437-0.key_results: Two reflective circularly polarized bands separated by narrow bandpass (<-1 dB insertion loss); symmetric transmission ±Z; partial reflector behavior outside bandpass; validated by ECM and fabricated prototype
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44437-0.comments: Clever design combining multiple functions; experimental validation with 17×29 prototype is thorough; concept potentially useful for rasorbers and communications but represents incremental engineering.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44500-w.task: Generating zeptosecond electron pulse trains via multiphoton inelastic Cherenkov diffraction
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44500-w.model: (relativistic quantum kinetics) Dirac equation with inelastic scattering on laser phase-lattice
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44500-w.inputs: Relativistic electron beam, slowed laser pulse (dielectric/gas medium), multiphoton absorption
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44500-w.outputs: Electron pulse compression, attosecond-zeptosecond pulse train, matter-wave sub-packets
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44500-w.key_results: Multiphoton absorption (up to 10⁴ photons) compresses electron wave packet; attosecond-zeptosecond pulse trains formed after free propagation; compression robust to laser duration but sensitive to momentum spread
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44500-w.comments: Ambitious proposal for tabletop zeptosecond sources; relativistic quantum kinetics approach is sophisticated but lacks experimental validation; scaling to practical microtron energies undemonstrated.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-41235-6.task: Quantifying glacier volume change and projecting survival timelines using satellite data
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-41235-6.model: (satellite remote sensing + projection) nine North American benchmark glaciers
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-41235-6.inputs: 1957 baseline surveys, satellite data 1957-present, future temperature projections
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-41235-6.outputs: Cumulative volume loss, areal shrinkage, glacier survival projections to 2100
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-41235-6.key_results: 1.4 Gt freshwater lost since 1957; average 33% areal shrinkage; only 3 of 9 glaciers survive by 2100; methodology applicable globally at cost-effective scale
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-41235-6.comments: Clear documentation of dramatic glacier decline; projections based on temperature-volume integration but do not account for nonlinear threshold effects or potential stabilization.

nature:10.1038/s44172-026-00624-5.task: Designing LPBF-printed high entropy alloy for acoustic insulation via Anderson localization
nature:10.1038/s44172-026-00624-5.model: (experiment + simulation) CrMnFeCoNi HEA with intrinsic manufacturing voids
nature:10.1038/s44172-026-00624-5.inputs: LPBF process parameters, void fraction (up to 25%), sample thickness (10 mm)
nature:10.1038/s44172-026-00624-5.outputs: Sound transmission reduction, hardness, acoustic wave localization, mechanical integrity
nature:10.1038/s44172-026-00624-5.key_results: −65 dB average sound transmission reduction over 10 mm in water; Anderson localization from void-induced backscattering; 10% hardness advantage vs stainless steel 316 despite >25% defects
nature:10.1038/s44172-026-00624-5.comments: Innovative approach exploiting manufacturing defects as acoustic features; experimental validation is strong but acoustic performance primarily reflects void fraction rather than HEA material properties.

nature:10.1038/s41560-026-02013-w.task: Exploiting VO2 insulator-metal transition for enhanced photocatalytic methane conversion
nature:10.1038/s41560-026-02013-w.model: (experiment) VO2 thin film at phase transition temperature with photocatalytic testing
nature:10.1038/s41560-026-02013-w.inputs: Temperature (near transition), magnetic field, laser illumination, methane feed
nature:10.1038/s41560-026-02013-w.outputs: Methane conversion rate, propane selectivity, C-C coupling, photo-generated charge carriers
nature:10.1038/s41560-026-02013-w.key_results: Peak photocatalytic activity at critical transition temperature; coexisting insulating/metallic domains with non-integer fractal boundaries; 100% propane selectivity via C-C coupling; field-assisted phase triggering boosts conversion
nature:10.1038/s41560-026-02013-w.comments: Elegant exploitation of phase transition dynamics for catalysis; mechanism of enhanced charge separation at transition temperature is well-motivated but microscopic origin of selectivity switching deserves deeper characterization.

nature:10.1038/s41566-026-01880-9.task: Demonstrating photonic quantum reservoir computing with controllable memory via continuous variables
nature:10.1038/s41566-026-01880-9.model: (experiment + simulation) multimode squeezed-state QRC with spectral/temporal multiplexing
nature:10.1038/s41566-026-01880-9.inputs: Encoded data via pump phase shaping, programmable feedback modulation, homodyne detection
nature:10.1038/s41566-026-01880-9.outputs: Nonlinear temporal task outputs (parity check, chaotic forecasting), memory capacity, expressivity
nature:10.1038/s41566-026-01880-9.key_results: Real-time memory implemented via electro-optic feedback; nonlinear temporal tasks enabled (parity at variable delays, chaotic signal forecasting); high-fidelity Digital Twin validation; entangled multimode structure enhances expressivity
nature:10.1038/s41566-026-01880-9.comments: Solid proof-of-concept for practical photonic QRC with memory; Digital Twin validation strengthens credibility; scaling to larger temporal windows and more complex tasks remains to be demonstrated.

nature:10.1038/s44182-026-00081-4.task: Enabling vision-only flight control via event camera and neural networks without IMU
nature:10.1038/s44182-026-00081-4.model: (neural network + experiment) recurrent convolutional network on event-camera data
nature:10.1038/s44182-026-00081-4.inputs: Event stream from downward-facing event camera, quadrotor dynamics
nature:10.1038/s44182-026-00081-4.outputs: Attitude estimation, rotation rate, flight control signals (replaces IMU)
nature:10.1038/s44182-026-00081-4.key_results: Successful real-world flight without inertial sensors; small recurrent CNN trained via supervised learning replaces IMU; network with memory + horizon cues achieves best performance; narrow field-of-view variants show better relative generalization
nature:10.1038/s44182-026-00081-4.comments: Practical contribution to insect-scale robotics; vision-only approach is compelling but generalization across diverse environments and rapid maneuvers remains limited; event camera temporal resolution is key advantage.

hf:2603.16777.task: Multi-step task planning for multimodal agents
hf:2603.16777.outputs: Action sequences with anticipated future states
hf:2603.16777.key_results: Substantial improvements in planning stability and execution robustness across seven benchmarks; improved generalization over reactive baselines
hf:2603.16777.comments: Two-stage RL approach (trajectory-level + grounded fine-tuning) is well-motivated, though absolute performance metrics are not quantified in the abstract.

hf:2603.16063.task: Efficient adaptation of Vision Transformers with linear attention
hf:2603.16063.inputs: Vision foundation models and downstream vision tasks
hf:2603.16063.outputs: Linearized ViT parameters for classification and segmentation
hf:2603.16063.key_results: Effective knowledge transfer from softmax ViTs to linear attention variants; demonstrated on classification and segmentation tasks
hf:2603.16063.comments: Three-stage alignment strategy (attention, feature, fine-tuning) addresses layer-wise error accumulation, but specific performance gains versus baselines are not reported in abstract.

hf:2603.12396.task: Improving efficiency and accuracy of iterative RAG systems
hf:2603.12396.outputs: Retrieved documents and generated answers with reasoning
hf:2603.12396.key_results: 5.6% increase in EM score and 10.5% reduction in retrieval turns compared to Search-R1 baseline on HotpotQA and Natural Questions
hf:2603.12396.comments: Test-time modifications are practical and yield concrete improvements, but the approach is incremental optimization rather than fundamental architectural innovation.

nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70837-x.task: Elucidate proton channel control of carbonate chemistry in calcifying vesicles
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70837-x.model: (experiment) sea urchin embryo live-cell imaging with electrophysiology
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70837-x.inputs: Sea urchin calcifying cells, membrane potential, Ca²⁺ and Mg²⁺ ions, pH gradients
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70837-x.outputs: Intra-vesicular pH and Ca²⁺ concentrations, proton conductance, vesicle exocytosis dynamics
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70837-x.key_results: Otop2l channel activation by alkaline pH, Ca²⁺, and Mg²⁺ creates highly alkaline (>pH 8) conditions in ACC-forming vesicles; high proton permeability drives pH control at mineralization front
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70837-x.comments: The identification of Otop2l as a master pH regulator provides mechanistic insight into biomineralization robustness and suggests vulnerability to ocean acidification through impaired channel function.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44463-y.task: Prevent glucocorticoid-induced osteoporosis via osteoblast protection
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44463-y.model: (experiment) MC3T3-E1 pre-osteoblasts, BMSCs, dexamethasone-induced mouse model
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44463-y.outputs: Osteogenic differentiation markers, bone density, bone architecture, VEGFR2/PI3K/AKT pathway activation
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44463-y.key_results: 5-HMF enhanced VEGFR2 phosphorylation, restored angiogenesis, activated PI3K/AKT signaling; MK2206 (AKT inhibitor) abrogated protective effects
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44463-y.comments: Network pharmacology prediction complements functional validation, though the in vivo quantitative bone density improvements are not explicitly stated numerically.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44176-2.task: Characterize CYFIP2 R87C variant effects on neuronal development
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44176-2.model: (experiment) CRISPR/Cas9-edited hPSC-derived neurons and cortical organoids
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44176-2.inputs: R87C variant in CYFIP2; differentiation protocol into NPCs and cortical neurons
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44176-2.outputs: Neural morphology, motility, electrophysiology, protein expression, progenitor pool status
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44176-2.key_results: Mutant NPCs showed reduced motility and altered lamellipodia; R87C/R87C organoids displayed premature progenitor depletion (absent SOX2+ cells by day 30) and increased size, while 2D cultures showed minimal phenotype
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44176-2.comments: The stark divergence between 2D monolayer and 3D organoid phenotypes underscores the importance of physiological context; the mechanistic link to epileptic encephalopathy remains speculative.

nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70522-z.task: Elucidate KIF11 function in microtubule dynamics and dendritic development
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70522-z.model: (experiment) live-imaging in postmitotic neurons; photo-controllable KIF11 optogenetic tool
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70522-z.inputs: KIF11 depletion or MCLID mutations (Y82F, ΔCterm); neuronal cultures
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70522-z.outputs: MT dynamics (minus-end-out), dendritic arborization, mEPSC frequency, MT crosslinking, sliding velocity, ATP affinity
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70522-z.key_results: KIF11 depletion increased MT dynamics; MCLID mutants reduced MT dynamics and dendritic growth; ΔCterm disrupted tetramer formation and MT crosslinking; Y82F reduced sliding velocity and ATP affinity
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70522-z.comments: The identification of KIF11 as a 'MT dynamics rheostat' is elegant, though the direct causal relationship between MT dynamics changes and dendritic arborization deficits could be further mechanistically dissected.

nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70677-9.task: Determine NEC pathogenesis via polarity loss and Kras activation in intestinal epithelium
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70677-9.model: (experiment) Cdc42-knockout + oncogenic Kras mouse intestinal epithelial model
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70677-9.inputs: Cdc42 loss; oncogenic Kras activation; initiation from stem cells or differentiated epithelium
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70677-9.outputs: Intestinal architecture, stem cell population, YAP/Hippo signaling, inflammatory cytokines, necroptotic cell death, transcriptomic signatures
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70677-9.key_results: Combined Cdc42 loss + Kras activation caused intestinal failure, stem cell loss, elevated IL-1/TNFα, necroptotic activation; suppression of YAP, IL-1, TNFα, or necroptosis rescued pathology
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70677-9.comments: Single-cell transcriptomics reveals coordinated dysregulation, and therapeutic rescue experiments provide strong mechanistic support, though the relative contribution of each pathway to lethality remains quantitatively unspecified.

nature:10.1038/s41746-026-02510-y.task: Smartphone-based detection and management of pediatric blepharoptosis
nature:10.1038/s41746-026-02510-y.inputs: Smartphone blink video clips and facial images (3164 clips, 1229 images)
nature:10.1038/s41746-026-02510-y.outputs: Morphological measurements, levator dysfunction classification, ptosis management recommendations
nature:10.1038/s41746-026-02510-y.key_results: Morphological ICC >0.90 vs manual; functional AUC 0.993; stratification accuracy 0.91 internal/0.89 real-world; patient satisfaction 4.93/5
nature:10.1038/s41746-026-02510-y.comments: Clinical translation is strong but generalizability across diverse smartphone hardware and lighting conditions remains underexplored.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44009-2.task: Improve convergence and accuracy in differentially private stochastic gradient descent
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44009-2.model: FLDP training (fractional-order learning with differential privacy)
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44009-2.inputs: Sensitive training data with strict privacy budget constraints
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44009-2.outputs: Model parameters, test accuracy, privacy guarantee (membership inference ROC)
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44009-2.key_results: Test accuracy improvement 0.5–2 percentage points over baseline DPSGD; membership inference AUC ~0.5; faster convergence at same privacy level
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44009-2.comments: Buffered rejection is intuitive but the phased decay strategy introduces additional hyperparameters that may complicate tuning in practice.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-40717-x.task: Distinguish neurological from orthopedic gait disorders in dogs using inertial sensors
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-40717-x.model: Deep learning on inertial measurement unit (IMU) data
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-40717-x.inputs: Wearable inertial sensor readings during gait (29 dogs)
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-40717-x.key_results: Multiclass accuracy 0.96; binary accuracy 0.85 on unseen dogs; robust generalization demonstrated
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-40717-x.comments: Small sample size (29 dogs) and lack of cross-breed or cross-gait-speed validation limits immediate clinical deployment.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44370-2.task: Identify immune and inflammatory pathways associated with bovine respiratory disease using transcriptomics
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44370-2.model: RNA-Seq differential expression analysis with functional enrichment
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44370-2.inputs: Whole-blood RNA from 60 high-risk stocker heifers across multiple timepoints; metaphylaxis treatment (tulathromycin or control)
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44370-2.outputs: Differentially expressed genes (DEGs), pathway enrichment, candidate biomarkers for BRD
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44370-2.key_results: >2000 DEGs at disease onset (FDR ≤0.05); five consistent biomarkers (IL1R2, HP, S100A9, TLR4, ALOX15); minimal transcriptomic differences between metaphylaxis groups
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44370-2.comments: Low morbidity rate in cohort prevented prediction of disease development; heat shock proteins emerged as potential severity markers but require validation.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-41657-2.task: Regulate mean arterial pressure and cardiac output with adaptive control under time-varying delays
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-41657-2.model: Modified Smith predictor (MSP) with fuzzy self-tuning fractional-order PID (FLOPID) controller
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-41657-2.inputs: Patient hemodynamic state; drug infusions (sodium nitroprusside, dopamine); bounded variable delays (≤60 s)
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-41657-2.outputs: Optimal drug infusion rates for MAP and CO regulation; closed-loop control signals
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-41657-2.key_results: Faster rise/settling times, reduced overshoot, lower integral error vs conventional PID and FOPID; clinically acceptable performance under parameter uncertainty and disturbances
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-41657-2.comments: Simulation-based validation only; clinical trial data and comparison to predictive/MPC strategies remain absent.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43674-7.task: oil well production forecasting with hyperparameter optimization
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43674-7.key_results: All performance metrics outperform ISSA-LSTM and GWO-LSTM baselines; accuracy satisfies practical oilfield requirements
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43674-7.comments: The improved sparrow search algorithm (cyclic chaotic mapping, producer-predator updates) is standard metaheuristic engineering; validation on only two wells limits generalization claims.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-41630-z.task: hyperparameter optimization for fog computing performance prediction
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-41630-z.model: Good Point Set Stepwise Shrinkage optimization
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-41630-z.inputs: fog computing node performance data from IoT devices
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-41630-z.key_results: SVM MSE 4.061, BP MSE 4.114, CNN MSE 3.963 ± 0.0323; simpler than Sequential Uniform Designs; reduces cross-validation uncertainty
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-41630-z.comments: The proposed method is essentially a structured design-of-experiments approach; the modest MSE values lack context without baseline comparisons or normalization by data scale.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44613-2.task: early lost circulation prediction in drilling
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44613-2.inputs: mud logging data (pit volume, standpipe pressure, flow difference, top drive load)
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44613-2.key_results: PSO-BP outperforms standard BP, BAS-BP, and GA-BP models; validated under actual drilling conditions
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44613-2.comments: Domain-guided feature selection is valuable, but no quantitative accuracy metrics are reported; comparison baselines suggest only marginal improvements.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42388-0.task: spatiotemporal chlorophyll-a prediction with causal discovery
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42388-0.model: Graph Neural Network Transformer (GNN-T) with convergent cross-mapping
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42388-0.inputs: MODIS/Aqua and ERA5 satellite data, 300,000 observations
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42388-0.outputs: spatiotemporal Chl-a concentration predictions, causal relationships, bloom risk levels
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42388-0.key_results: Test R² = 0.906 (Gulf of Mexico); outperforms CNN-LSTM, BiLSTM, Temporal-Relational GNN, AGTCNSD; causality-driven feature selection achieves R² = 0.882 with 25% reduced computational cost; identifies SST, fluorescence height, POC as key drivers
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42388-0.comments: The integration of causal inference (CCM, Sobol) with model ablation is methodologically sound; generalization across gulfs strengthens claims, and uncertainty quantification via Monte Carlo dropout is rigorous.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44187-z.task: underwater fish object detection with complex environmental conditions
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44187-z.model: YOLO-Starfish (YOLOv8 + C2Star module + Attention-driven Enhancement Module)
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44187-z.inputs: underwater images with poor quality, randomness, occlusion
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44187-z.outputs: fish species and bounding box detections
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44187-z.key_results: Strong performance on RUOD and new Underwater Freshwater Fish Dataset (UFFD: 16,904 images, 19 species); excellent results on COCO2017; C2Star and ADEM improve robustness
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44187-z.comments: The C2Star module's element-wise multiplication approach to mimic optical degradation is intuitive; however, no quantitative metrics (mAP, precision/recall) are provided in the abstract.

nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70721-8.task: identify environmental and evolutionary drivers of fungal metabolic diversity
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70721-8.model: comparative genomics and metabolomics across phylogeographic populations
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70721-8.inputs: 1052 Aspergillus flavus strains from four continents with genomic and metabolomic data
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70721-8.outputs: phylogeographic metabolic patterns, biosynthetic gene clusters, specialized metabolite profiles
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70721-8.key_results: low-mycotoxin clades produce distinct uncharacterized metabolites; regulatory and primary metabolic changes, not just biosynthetic gene variation, explain 70%+ of metabolite profile differentiation
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70721-8.comments: Multi-omics integration is thorough, but causal mechanisms underlying regulatory changes remain incompletely specified.

hf:2603.13398.task: Document parsing and layout analysis via image-to-Markdown
hf:2603.13398.outputs: Markdown text with layout structure, tables, charts, answers
hf:2603.13398.key_results: 93.12 on OmniDocBench v1.5; first among end-to-end models; surpasses Gemini-3.1-Pro on KIE
hf:2603.13398.comments: Layout-as-Thought mechanism recovers explicit layout reasoning which is typically lost in end-to-end approaches.

hf:2603.16669.task: Action-conditioned 4D robot simulation from video generation
hf:2603.16669.inputs: Robot control trajectories and environmental context
hf:2603.16669.outputs: Synchronized RGB and pointmap sequences of robot-world interactions
hf:2603.16669.key_results: Demonstrates zero-shot transfer capability with physically-plausible geometry-consistent interactions
hf:2603.16669.comments: First work to model robot-world interactions as true 4D spatiotemporal events rather than 2D or static-guided approaches.

hf:2603.15132.task: High-quality pixel-space image generation via trajectory disentanglement
hf:2603.15132.inputs: Noisy images and semantic waypoint guidance from vision models
hf:2603.15132.key_results: 2.2x faster JiT training convergence than pixel-space baselines on ImageNet 256×256
hf:2603.15132.comments: Elegantly solves optimal transport path conflicts in pixel space by introducing semantic waypoints as intermediate checkpoints.

hf:2603.16139.task: Efficient visual generation pre-training for unified multimodal models
hf:2603.16139.inputs: Unlabeled images (stage 1), then mixed unlabeled and paired data (stage 2)
hf:2603.16139.key_results: 0.89 GenEval and 0.55 WISE; trained in ~1050 GPU hours; surpasses BAGEL-7B and BLIP3-o-4B
hf:2603.16139.comments: Removes paired-data dependency in expensive pre-training by leveraging abundant unlabeled images via masked modeling.

hf:2603.13875.task: Compressed memory for long-context language models via test-time optimization
hf:2603.13875.inputs: Long context documents and queries without context access
hf:2603.13875.outputs: Answers retrieved from compact prefix memory tokens
hf:2603.13875.key_results: Outperforms forward-only memory writers; scales memory capacity more effectively with additional gradient steps
hf:2603.13875.comments: Loss-driven write operation via gradient descent is novel—most memory methods rely purely on forward passes.

hf:2603.15401.task: Evaluating marginal utility of agent skills in software engineering
hf:2603.15401.inputs: GitHub repositories, requirements, and optional skills
hf:2603.15401.outputs: Pass/fail task completion with execution-based verification
hf:2603.15401.key_results: 39 of 49 skills yield zero improvement; average gain only +1.2%; only 7 skills produce >+5% gains
hf:2603.15401.comments: Critical finding: skills are narrower interventions than assumed; utility strongly depends on domain fit and contextual compatibility.

hf:2603.16309.task: Machine translation for 1,600 languages with massive multilingual coverage
hf:2603.16309.inputs: Source language text in 1,600 language pairs
hf:2603.16309.key_results: 1B–8B models match or exceed 70B LLM baseline; enables coherent generation for previously unsupported languages
hf:2603.16309.comments: Comprehensive data strategy and specialization show clear advantage over generic LLMs; first system at 1,600-language scale.

hf:2603.16649.task: Semantic-aware diverse image stylization via mixture of experts
hf:2603.16649.inputs: Content image and style embedding from unified style encoder
hf:2603.16649.outputs: Stylized images preserving semantics and material details
hf:2603.16649.key_results: Outperforms existing approaches; generalizes to unseen styles with improved semantic and material preservation
hf:2603.16649.comments: MoE routing allows handling diverse styles across multiple semantic levels—shallow textures to deep semantics.

hf:2603.14588.task: Persistent agent memory with information-geometric foundations
hf:2603.14588.outputs: Retrieved memory contexts with contradiction detection
hf:2603.14588.key_results: +12.7 pp over engineering baselines on LoCoMo; 75% accuracy without cloud; 87.7% with cloud augmentation
hf:2603.14588.comments: Rigorous mathematical foundations (Fisher information, Langevin dynamics, sheaf theory) replacing heuristics; EU AI Act compliant.

hf:2603.15674.task: Theoretical analysis and formal guarantees for multi-evidence probabilistic reasoning
hf:2603.15674.outputs: Calibrated probabilistic predictions with uncertainty quantification
hf:2603.15674.key_results: Calibration ECE ≤ ε + C/√K_eff; PAC-Bayes bound gap 0.0085 at N=4200; within 1.12× information-theoretic lower bound
hf:2603.15674.comments: Seven formal guarantees establish trustworthiness; validates on safety-critical applications (diagnosis, compliance, finance).

hf:2603.15670.task: Multi-evidence probabilistic reasoning with latent uncertainty aggregation
hf:2603.15670.outputs: Calibrated probabilistic predictions with explicit uncertainty
hf:2603.15670.key_results: 97.8% accuracy; ECE 1.4%; substantially outperforms EDL, LLMs, and graph baselines on 8 domains
hf:2603.15670.comments: Bridges latent VAE posteriors with structured SPN inference; enables controlled comparison of probabilistic vs. learned reasoning.

hf:2603.12226.task: Identifying interdisciplinary insights for creative scientific reasoning
hf:2603.12226.outputs: Ranked source domains with recontextualized interdisciplinary insights
hf:2603.12226.key_results: +21% improvement in novelty; +16% in insightfulness while remaining grounded in original research
hf:2603.12226.comments: Metacognitive features (goal assessment, challenge identification, impact ranking) drive creative reasoning without premature solution anchoring.

hf:2603.16587.task: Pan-cancer morphology-to-outcome linking via histomic analysis
hf:2603.16587.outputs: 38 interpretable histomic features linked to survival, mutations, immunity, expression
hf:2603.16587.key_results: Covariate-adjusted, multiple-testing corrected; recovers known biology; enables biomarker discovery without specialized staining
hf:2603.16587.comments: Spatially traceable features and compartment-specific immune signals provide interpretability rarely achieved at scale.

hf:2603.15118.task: Multimodal structured data extraction from government forms
hf:2603.15118.model: (multimodal foundation models) evaluated on VAREX benchmark
hf:2603.15118.inputs: Document text, layout-preserving text, image, or text+image
hf:2603.15118.outputs: Structured extracted fields conforming to document schema
hf:2603.15118.key_results: Schema compliance is dominant bottleneck <4B; +81 pp gain with fine-tuning at 2B; layout-text outperforms pixels by +3–18 pp
hf:2603.15118.comments: First benchmark with four controlled input modalities per document; reveals schema echo as critical failure mode below 4B.

hf:2603.14704.task: Graph-theoretic planning for adaptive diffusion sampling trajectories
hf:2603.14704.inputs: Noisy images and Diffusion DNA (per-stage denoising difficulty signature)
hf:2603.14704.key_results: Discovers context-aware trajectories; improves output quality and stability; reduces redundant computation
hf:2603.14704.comments: Train-free framework reformulates sampling as DAG planning; enables System 2 deliberative planning versus reflexive System 1.

nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70578-x.task: Determine structures of ATP synthase and respiratory supercomplexes in native mitochondrial membranes
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70578-x.inputs: Sub-mitochondrial particles (SMPs) from bovine heart mitochondria
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70578-x.outputs: High-resolution 3D structures of FoF1-IF₁ dimers/tetramers and respiratory supercomplex compositions
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70578-x.key_results: FoF1 tetrameric units stabilized by IF₁; identification of new supercomplex composition CI₁CIII₂CIV₃ and mega-complex CI₂CIII₂CIV₆; Fo domain e-subunit–c₈-ring interface resolved without discrete lipid density
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70578-x.comments: This work elegantly bridges structural biology with functional organization of cristae, enabling rapid characterization from minimal membrane fractions.

nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70611-z.task: Map mutational effects on IAPP amyloid nucleation and aggregation
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70611-z.model: deep mutational scanning of 1916 IAPP variants
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70611-z.inputs: Islet amyloid polypeptide sequence variants (substitutions, insertions, truncations, deletions)
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70611-z.outputs: Quantitative mutational atlas showing relative amyloid nucleation propensity for each variant
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70611-z.key_results: Residues 15-32 are highly sensitive to mutation; residues 21-27 show tightest structural constraints; nucleation-slowing mutations correlate between IAPP and Aβ but acceleration mutations do not
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70611-z.comments: The finding that mutation effects are directionally asymmetric between different amyloid peptides suggests context-dependent mechanistic differences in nucleation pathways.

nature:10.1038/s41556-026-01908-w.task: Elucidate kinase-mediated regulation of biomolecular condensate size and dynamics
nature:10.1038/s41556-026-01908-w.model: biophysical model of phase separation with phosphorylation-dependent interaction disruption
nature:10.1038/s41556-026-01908-w.inputs: Cell cycle phase; KEY1 kinase activity; Rubisco-EPYC1 linker protein interactions
nature:10.1038/s41556-026-01908-w.outputs: Condensate size, number, and positioning dynamics; dissolution and re-condensation kinetics
nature:10.1038/s41556-026-01908-w.key_results: KEY1 phosphorylates EPYC1 to disrupt Rubisco-EPYC1 interactions and control pyrenoid condensate size; key1 mutants display multiple persistent small condensates unable to dissolve during cell division; biophysical model predicts condensate position control
nature:10.1038/s41556-026-01908-w.comments: This work elegantly connects post-translational modification to phase separation regulation, offering a generalizable mechanism for controlling condensate properties that likely extends beyond pyrenoids.

nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70679-7.task: Characterize UPR dynamics under chronic ER stress
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70679-7.model: (experiment) pharmacologically induced ER stress in cultured cells and mouse liver
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70679-7.inputs: Long-term ER stress (tunicamycin/thapsigargin); ER calcium levels
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70679-7.outputs: IRE1α phosphorylation; calreticulin-IRE1α interaction intensity; ER calcium dynamics
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70679-7.key_results: IRE1α activity shows 'up-down-up' fluctuation pattern; calreticulin-IRE1α interaction negatively correlates with Ca2+ concentration and exhibits circadian oscillation in mouse liver
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70679-7.comments: Elegant mapping of temporal dynamics reveals calcium-dependent regulation that may explain why chronic ER stress can be both pro-survival and pro-apoptotic.

nature:10.1038/s41467-026-69830-1.task: Elucidate mechanism of polar chromosome rescue from missegregation
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-69830-1.model: (experiment) live-cell imaging; Eg5/KIF11 modulation in cultured cells
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-69830-1.inputs: Polar chromosomes initially behind spindle pole; spindle elongation signals
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-69830-1.outputs: Chromosome positioning; microtubule pivoting angle and extent; kinetochore attachment topology
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-69830-1.key_results: Spindle elongation drives astral microtubule pivoting around centrosome; polar chromosomes form mono-lateral kinetochore attachments lacking Astrin; enhanced elongation accelerates polar chromosome resolution
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-69830-1.comments: Mechanistic insight into a common source of chromosomal instability in cancer; the 'danger zone' concept provides a useful framework for understanding segregation errors.

nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70631-9.task: Identify MAPK scaffold regulating sexual differentiation signaling in fission yeast
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70631-9.inputs: Pheromone activation; PIP2 membrane localization signals
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70631-9.outputs: Sms1 membrane translocation; MAPK cascade assembly and activation; mating pathway output
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70631-9.key_results: Sms1 (hemi-arrestin) recruits MAPK cascade to membrane via Gα and PIP2; phosphorylation (including by MAPK itself) antagonizes membrane localization, creating negative feedback; prevents untimely mating
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70631-9.comments: Convergent evolution of MAPK scaffolds despite distinct structural folds highlights functional convergence; the feedback mechanism elegantly explains how cells prevent spurious mating attempts.

nature:10.1038/s42003-026-09862-x.task: Determine role of Chk1-mediated β-tubulin phosphorylation in spindle formation
nature:10.1038/s42003-026-09862-x.model: (experiment) vertebrate cell culture (HeLa, RPE1); in vitro kinase assays
nature:10.1038/s42003-026-09862-x.inputs: β-tubulin; Chk1 kinase; ATR-ATRIP-TopBP1 signaling complex at centrosomes
nature:10.1038/s42003-026-09862-x.outputs: β-tubulin-T285 phosphorylation; spindle microtubule density and nucleation; chromosome segregation fidelity
nature:10.1038/s42003-026-09862-x.key_results: Chk1 phosphorylates β-tubulin at T285 at centrosomes; impaired phosphorylation causes improper spindle, delayed anaphase, chromosome misalignment, unequal daughter cell size; ATR-ATRIP-TopBP1 promotes Chk1 activation
nature:10.1038/s42003-026-09862-x.comments: Surprising discovery that a DNA damage kinase (Chk1) functions in unperturbed mitosis; suggests spindle integrity checkpoints share kinase machinery with DNA damage responses.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44659-2.task: Compare efficacy of albumin-cross-linked PRF vs. conventional platelet concentrates for angiogenesis
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44659-2.model: (experiment) co-culture of HUVECs with autologous platelet concentrates (APCs); in vitro assays
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44659-2.inputs: Alb-PRF, PRP, or H-PRF; HUVEC cultures; LPS-induced inflammatory damage
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44659-2.outputs: HUVEC proliferation; migration; apoptosis; CD31 expression; mitochondrial markers
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44659-2.key_results: Alb-PRF superior to PRP and H-PRF in promoting HUVEC proliferation and migration; Alb-PRF rescues LPS-induced apoptosis and upregulates CD31; superior angiogenic capacity under normal and inflammatory conditions
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44659-2.comments: Clinical translation appears promising, but lacks in vivo wound healing validation and mechanistic insight into why albumin cross-linking provides advantage over conventional PRF formulations.

nature:10.1038/s42003-026-09830-5.task: Elucidate butyrate-FFAR2 signaling in L-cell GLP-1/PYY secretion
nature:10.1038/s42003-026-09830-5.model: (experiment) human L-cell model; mouse intestinal organoid (Hes1-GFP reporter)
nature:10.1038/s42003-026-09830-5.inputs: Butyrate; FFAR2 agonist AZ-1729; Notch cascade modulation
nature:10.1038/s42003-026-09830-5.outputs: GLP-1/PYY secretion ratio; NeuroD1 and Pax6 expression; Hes1 signal; transcriptional profile
nature:10.1038/s42003-026-09830-5.key_results: Butyrate stimulates PYY-biased GLP-1/PYY secretion via FFAR2-Gαi without dynamin-dependent internalization; suppresses Notch-antagonistic Hes1; upregulates late-stage maturation markers NeuroD1/Pax6; AZ-1729 further enhances response
nature:10.1038/s42003-026-09830-5.comments: Demonstrates how dietary fiber metabolites fine-tune enteroendocrine cell identity; selective Gαi-biased agonism offers potential therapeutic avenue for obesity without classical β-arrestin signaling.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-41141-x.task: Determine kynurenine-mTOR signaling axis in HNSCC angiogenesis
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-41141-x.model: (experiment) HNSCC tissue; HUVECs; CAM assay; CDX mouse model
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-41141-x.inputs: Kynurenine (tryptophan metabolite); IDO1 enzyme expression; endothelial cells
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-41141-x.outputs: HUVEC migration and tube formation; neovascularization; mTOR activation; angiogenic gene expression
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-41141-x.key_results: IDO1-driven kynurenine elevated in HNSCC correlates with CD31/CD34 endothelial markers; kynurenine enhances HUVEC migration, tube formation and CAM neovascularization; activates mTOR signaling upregulating pro-angiogenic genes (VEGF, bFGF, IL-8)
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-41141-x.comments: Links tryptophan catabolism in tumor microenvironment to vascular remodeling; suggests metabolic reprogramming actively shapes angiogenesis, offering druggable targets beyond anti-angiogenic ligand inhibition.

nature:10.1038/s41523-026-00924-1.task: Characterize cytoplasmic AR localization and metabolic reprogramming in AI-resistant breast cancer
nature:10.1038/s41523-026-00924-1.model: (experiment) AI-resistant breast cancer cell lines; human tumor microarray; LC-MS/MS proteomics
nature:10.1038/s41523-026-00924-1.inputs: Adrenal androgens; aromatase inhibitor-resistant conditions; AI-sensitive vs. resistant cells
nature:10.1038/s41523-026-00924-1.outputs: AR subcellular localization; interacting protein partners; mitochondrial mass/potential; oxidative metabolism
nature:10.1038/s41523-026-00924-1.key_results: High cytoplasmic AR predicts poor survival in luminal B post-menopausal breast cancer; AI-resistant cells show diffuse cytoplasmic AR with increased mitochondrial mass, oxidative phosphorylation and glycolysis; G3BP1, SLIRP, IGFBP5 identified as AR-interacting proteins mediating metabolic adaptation and ERα repression
nature:10.1038/s41523-026-00924-1.comments: Novel mechanistic link between non-genomic AR signaling and metabolic rewiring in endocrine resistance; cytoplasmic AR localization may be a biomarker for treatment-refractory disease with prognostic value.

nature:10.1038/s41420-026-02997-0.task: Elucidate GAD1/GABA pathway suppression of glioblastoma via Wnt-signaling inhibition
nature:10.1038/s41420-026-02997-0.model: (experiment) glioblastoma cell lines (U87, LN229); zebrafish xenotransplantation
nature:10.1038/s41420-026-02997-0.outputs: Cell proliferation; colony formation; cell cycle phase distribution; invasion; p-GSK3β/β-catenin signaling; Cyclin D1, MMP9 expression
nature:10.1038/s41420-026-02997-0.key_results: GAD1 downregulated in glioma correlating with poor prognosis; overexpression suppresses proliferation, invasion, and cell cycle progression via reduced p-GSK3β/β-catenin signaling; GSK3β inhibitor phenocopies GAD1 knockdown effects; zebrafish model confirms tumor suppression
nature:10.1038/s41420-026-02997-0.comments: Interesting connection between neuronal GABA synthesis enzyme and canonical Wnt pathway suppression; raises questions about whether GAD1 functions as a metabolic sensor or whether GABA itself mediates effects.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44355-1.task: Determine SIRT1-mediated ferroptosis pathway in cerebral infarction
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44355-1.model: (experiment) rat MCAO/reperfusion model; primary astrocytes; bioinformatic mining of ferroptosis-related genes
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44355-1.inputs: SIRT1 activation/inhibition; E2F1, NOTCH-1, YAP signaling; ferroptosis triggers
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44355-1.outputs: Infarction volume; astrocyte apoptosis; autophagy markers (Beclin-2, P62); ferroptosis markers (MDA, Fe2+, SOD); FOXO1 and NCOA4 expression
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44355-1.key_results: SIRT1 upregulated in cerebral infarction; SIRT1 activation increases infarct volume and astrocyte apoptosis; SIRT1 inhibits nuclear E2F1/NOTCH-1/YAP while upregulating FOXO1/autophagy/NCOA4 cascade; increased MDA and Fe2+ accumulation; NOTCH-1 overexpression reverses effects
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44355-1.comments: Mechanistically complex with multiple pathway intersections; the linkage between SIRT1, ferroptosis and NOTCH signaling is novel but would benefit from clearer cause-effect ordering and validation of ferroptosis vs. apoptosis as primary death mechanism.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44270-5.task: Develop sequencing technique to monitor sncRNA-Argonaute interactions and cell-cell transfer
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44270-5.model: (experiment) MIME-seq2.0 with engineered methyltransferase-Argonaute chimera; MIN6B1, Jurkat, C2C12 cell lines
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44270-5.inputs: Small non-coding RNAs (miRNAs, Y-RNAs, tRNA-fragments); extracellular vesicles; Argonaute proteins
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44270-5.outputs: Protected (non-oxidized) sncRNA abundance; sncRNA-Ago2 binding status; transferred miRNA detection in recipient cells
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44270-5.key_results: MIME enzyme protects oxidized sncRNAs from degradation enabling detection; distinguishes Ago2-bound miRNAs, Y-RNAs, and tRNA-fragments; successfully tracks miRNA transfer between Jurkat/C2C12 cells and MIN6B1 recipients via EVs
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44270-5.comments: Clever technical solution to a real problem (sncRNA oxidation preventing cloning), but the biological novelty is limited; applications to mechanistic questions about EV miRNA function remain to be demonstrated.

nature:10.1038/s41514-026-00359-9.task: Elucidate hydroxychloroquine protection against CTX-induced premature ovarian failure via mtDNA-cGAS pathway
nature:10.1038/s41514-026-00359-9.model: (experiment) CTX-induced POF mouse model; human granulosa cells (KGN); phosphoramide mustard (CTX metabolite)
nature:10.1038/s41514-026-00359-9.inputs: Hydroxychloroquine (HCQ); cyclophosphamide; mtDNA and ROS signals
nature:10.1038/s41514-026-00359-9.outputs: Follicle number; serum FSH/estradiol; granulosa cell senescence markers; mtDNA leakage; cGAS-STING activation; SASP factors
nature:10.1038/s41514-026-00359-9.key_results: HCQ reverses CTX-induced ovarian dysfunction and follicular depletion; attenuates senescence, stabilizes mitochondrial membranes, decreases ROS and mtDNA leakage, inhibits cGAS-STING signaling and SASP expression; improves fertility outcomes
nature:10.1038/s41514-026-00359-9.comments: Well-designed preclinical study with clear mechanistic pathway (mitochondrial dysfunction → mtDNA leak → cGAS activation → senescence); HCQ's anti-autophagy effects appear paradoxically beneficial here, suggesting context-dependent roles.

nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70652-4.task: Develop statistical framework for selecting appropriate background datasets in contrastive dimension reduction
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70652-4.model: (computational) spectral subspace inclusion theory; contrastive dimension reduction methods
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70652-4.inputs: Target dataset; multiple candidate background datasets; single-cell genomic data
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70652-4.outputs: Background suitability score; optimized target representation; contrast enrichment metrics
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70652-4.key_results: BasCoD framework based on spectral subspace inclusion theory enables rigorous background selection; improves contrast and interpretability of target representations across diverse single-cell datasets; guides experimental design for large-scale perturbation studies
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70652-4.comments: Addresses real practical problem in single-cell analysis where background choice critically impacts downstream interpretation; statistical rigor is strong but biological validation of selected backgrounds is limited.

nature:10.1038/s41586-026-10360-7.task: Determine molecular architecture of oocyte cytoplasmic lattice assembly
nature:10.1038/s41586-026-10360-7.model: (structural) cryo-EM of CPL isolated from mouse oocytes; protein-protein interaction mapping
nature:10.1038/s41586-026-10360-7.inputs: Oocyte cytoplasmic lattice components; CPL-containing oocyte lysates
nature:10.1038/s41586-026-10360-7.outputs: CPL three-dimensional structure; subunit composition; interaction interfaces; assembly organization
nature:10.1038/s41586-026-10360-7.key_results: CPL comprises 14 constitutive proteins organized as repeating 'U-shaped basket' (UB) and 'adapter ring' (AR) units forming filamentous architecture; PADI6 forms didecameric anchor; AR contains NLRP4f, SCMC, ZBED3; UBE2D3-UHRF1-NLRP14 and TUBB2B-TUBB2A-FBXW24-SKP1 complexes form UB sides
nature:10.1038/s41586-026-10360-7.comments: Landmark structural study resolving a long-standing mystery about a critical but poorly understood structure; provides molecular basis for understanding oocyte maturation and early embryonic development, though functional validation of specific interaction interfaces remains ongoing work.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-37518-7.task: Identify BTG3 tumor suppressor function in oral squamous cell carcinoma
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-37518-7.model: (experiment) OSCC cell lines (CAL27, SCC15); GEO/TCGA database analysis; gain/loss-of-function studies
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-37518-7.inputs: BTG3 overexpression/knockdown; PI3K/AKT signaling; epithelial-mesenchymal transition (EMT) markers
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-37518-7.outputs: OSCC cell proliferation; migration/invasion; cell cycle distribution; PI3K/AKT phosphorylation; EMT marker expression
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-37518-7.key_results: BTG3 downregulated in OSCC correlating with poor prognosis; overexpression inhibits proliferation, migration, invasion and arrests cells at G1 phase; negatively regulates PI3K/AKT signaling and inhibits EMT progression; knockdown reverses effects
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-37518-7.comments: Standard tumor suppressor characterization lacking mechanistic novelty; BTG3 interaction partners and direct downstream targets remain unidentified, limiting understanding of how it inhibits PI3K/AKT.

nature:10.1038/s41597-026-07069-7.task: Catalog viral integration sites and their genomic associations
nature:10.1038/s41597-026-07069-7.inputs: Manually curated data from 209 peer-reviewed publications covering 11 viruses
nature:10.1038/s41597-026-07069-7.outputs: Database of >270,000 VIS records with genomic coordinates, regulatory elements, and epigenomic features
nature:10.1038/s41597-026-07069-7.key_results: 3.5-fold increase in VIS entries; standardized annotations across retroviruses and DNA viruses; web-based query interface
nature:10.1038/s41597-026-07069-7.comments: Comprehensive resource but limited by publication bias and manual curation scalability; utility depends on annotation completeness.

nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70065-3.task: Investigate emergence of topographic cortical organization in neural networks
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70065-3.model: (experiment) deep neural networks with local lateral connections trained via backpropagation
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70065-3.inputs: Visual input data; lateral recurrent connections between neighboring units
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70065-3.outputs: Emergent topographic maps resembling primary, intermediate, and high-level visual cortex
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70065-3.key_results: Modular organization emerges without explicit topography-inducing objectives; improved robustness to adversarial perturbations
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70065-3.comments: Elegant demonstration that local recurrence suffices for map organization, but the relationship to actual cortical plasticity mechanisms remains unclear.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44499-0.task: Multimodal stress detection from EEG and ECG signals
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44499-0.model: (experiment) attention-based fusion of pre-trained neural networks (VGG16, EfficientNetB0, ResNeXt50)
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44499-0.inputs: EEG time-frequency maps (wavelet) and ECG time-series variability from neutral, tense, and positive states
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44499-0.outputs: Stress classification (three-way); attention weights for multimodal integration
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44499-0.key_results: 95.7% accuracy (vs. 82.3% EEG-only, 85.6% ECG-only); significant synergy between modalities; 26.9% inference speedup
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44499-0.comments: Strong empirical results on two datasets, but cross-dataset generalization and real-world deployment feasibility warrant further investigation.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43638-x.task: Identify glycosyltransferase LgtC inhibitors targeting UDP-galactose donor pocket
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43638-x.model: (computational) molecular docking (AutoDock-GPU) and 100 ns MD simulations (AMBER14)
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43638-x.inputs: Thioglycoside analogs (18 candidates from PubChem screening) with ADME-Tox filtering
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43638-x.outputs: Binding affinity scores and dynamic stability metrics; prioritized lead compounds
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43638-x.key_results: C-5 (−8.36 kcal/mol) and C-18 (−8.13 kcal/mol) exceed natural ligand UDP-α-D-galactose (−6.74 kcal/mol); stable poses with RMSD 2.0–3.0 Å
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43638-x.comments: Rigorous computational screening with MD validation, but in vitro biochemical assays remain necessary to confirm donor-site inhibition.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44209-w.task: Zero-shot English–Assamese translation via cross-lingual embedding alignment
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44209-w.model: (computational) multilingual mBART with Procrustes-optimized embedding alignment
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44209-w.inputs: Pivot language (Bengali) parallel data; English and Assamese text; language tags
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44209-w.outputs: English-to-Assamese translations; BLEU scores; adequacy and fluency ratings
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44209-w.key_results: BLEU 28.65 (7.53 points above baseline); adequacy 4.5/5, fluency 4.6/5; 8.4% error rate reduction; 26.9% inference speedup
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44209-w.comments: Effective bridge for low-resource translation, but BLEU gains are modest and human evaluation sample size is not disclosed.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42273-w.task: Identify genetic and phenotypic determinants of cacao yield via GWAS and ML prediction
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42273-w.model: (experimental) Bootstrap Forest GWAS with population-structure correction; Neural Network phenotype prediction
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42273-w.inputs: 346 diverse cacao accessions; SNP genotypes; pod index, seed number, wet bean mass phenotypes
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42273-w.outputs: SNP-importance rankings; enriched functional terms; phenotype-based yield predictions
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42273-w.key_results: Population-structure-corrected GWAS enriches for ribosome/translation terms; cotyledon mass and length are top predictors of wet bean mass
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42273-w.comments: Population structure correction improves interpretability, but low marker density and phenotype provenance limitations may inflate effect sizes.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42822-3.task: Characterize structure–function relationships of fatty acid ethanolamides and ROS-mediated apoptosis
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42822-3.model: (experiment) homologous FAE series (C8:0–C18:0); molecular docking; principal component analysis
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42822-3.inputs: FAE chain length; physicochemical properties (solubility, hydrophobicity); cell-based assays (ROS, MMP, apoptosis)
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42822-3.outputs: Acyl chain length as dominant determinant; apoptotic activity profiles; docking poses with cannabinoid receptors
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42822-3.key_results: C12:0-MEA shows distinct ROS/MMP/apoptosis profile; C16:0–C18:0-MEA exhibit enhanced hydrophobicity and apoptosis; chain length explains ~70% variance (PCA)
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42822-3.comments: Comprehensive structure–function study with elegant PCA synthesis, but the split between ROS-dependent and independent pathways in long-chain FAEs requires mechanistic clarification.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44593-3.task: Automated detection and segmentation of Weiss rings in fundus photographs
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44593-3.model: (experiment) U-Net segmentation + EfficientNet-B0 classification + meta-classifier fusion
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44593-3.inputs: Fundus photography images; segmentation and classification targets
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44593-3.outputs: Weiss ring localization masks; binary classification (presence/absence); Grad-CAM attention maps
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44593-3.key_results: U-Net Dice 0.578, IoU 0.421; meta-classifier AUC 0.903, accuracy 0.812, sensitivity 0.692, specificity 0.872
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44593-3.comments: Modest segmentation performance due to low contrast and peripapillary visibility challenges; clinical utility limited to archival review and research phenotyping without OCT confirmation.

nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70627-5.task: Characterize mechanistic basis of epistasis in protein mutations
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70627-5.model: Two-state protein stability model with additive contributions
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70627-5.inputs: Library of 14,000+ double mutants in TEM-1 β-lactamase α-helix
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70627-5.outputs: Fitness, minimum inhibitory concentration, epistatic interaction predictions
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70627-5.key_results: Most epistasis predictable from single-mutation effects via stability model; systematic deviations occur for residues in direct 3D contact; statistical models from homologous sequences partially recover epistatic interactions
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70627-5.comments: The finding that structure-dependent interactions explain deviations from additivity provides mechanistic insight, though the model's predictive power outside this specific helix remains unclear.

nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70512-1.task: Engineer high-yield pyomelanin biosynthesis from methanol
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70512-1.model: (Experiment) Engineered Komagataella phaffii with balanced biosynthetic modules and directed evolution
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70512-1.inputs: Methanol, engineered biosynthetic pathways (homogentisic acid synthesis and oxidative polymerization)
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70512-1.outputs: Pyomelanin titer (g/L), homogentisic acid yield fold-change
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70512-1.key_results: 66-fold increase in homogentisic acid yield; strain Pyo29 achieved 70.5 ± 0.7 g/L pyomelanin in 204 h fermentation; established color-screening system for directed evolution
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70512-1.comments: The substantial yield improvement demonstrates practical pathway engineering, though the balance between the three biosynthetic modules and their individual contributions could be better characterized.

nature:10.1038/s41467-026-69985-x.task: Determine how RPA stimulates Mer3 helicase processivity in meiotic crossover formation
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-69985-x.model: (experiment) single-molecule magnetic tweezers; (computational) AlphaFold2 structural modeling
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-69985-x.inputs: Mer3 helicase, RPA protein, double-stranded DNA, varying DNA tension conditions
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-69985-x.outputs: Helicase processivity, crossover frequency, recombination intermediate accumulation, protein localization at DSB sites
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-69985-x.key_results: RPA binding directly increases Mer3 processivity under low DNA tension; mer3 RPA-binding mutant shows reduced crossover frequencies and weakened DSB site recruitment
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-69985-x.comments: This work elegantly connects molecular interaction specificity to whole-organism meiotic phenotypes via single-molecule mechanics, though the biological relevance of low-tension conditions requires further validation.

nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70167-y.task: review translational pathways from mycology research to commercial products
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70167-y.inputs: mushroom biotechnology innovations and startup ecosystems
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70167-y.outputs: classification of cross-sectoral bioinspired innovation models
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70167-y.key_results: mushrooms identified as platform for sustainable industry and human wellbeing; startups bridge scientific advances to commercial application
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70167-y.comments: Perspective article lacking quantitative validation or mechanistic detail; primarily a conceptual framework for biotech translation.

nature:10.1038/s41467-026-69856-5.task: disentangle intra- and inter-cellular gene regulation from spatial transcriptomics
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-69856-5.model: generative graph neural network with causal inference framework
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-69856-5.outputs: causal gene regulation networks; post-perturbation counterfactual transcriptomics predictions
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-69856-5.key_results: validated disentanglement and causal identifiability on glioblastoma, fetal spleen, and lung cancer samples; generated experimentally inaccessible counterfactual transcriptomics states
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-69856-5.comments: Novel causal approach to single-cell spatial modeling, but counterfactual accuracy depends critically on causal graph identifiability assumptions.

nature:10.1038/s41556-026-01895-y.task: Characterize TDP-43 regulation of paraspeckle condensate assembly and neuroprotection
nature:10.1038/s41556-026-01895-y.model: (experiment) in vitro paraspeckle assembly; stressed human neurons
nature:10.1038/s41556-026-01895-y.inputs: TDP-43 concentration; NEAT1_2 ribonucleoprotein particles; cellular stress
nature:10.1038/s41556-026-01895-y.outputs: Paraspeckle condensation; cytoprotection; ALS survival correlation
nature:10.1038/s41556-026-01895-y.key_results: TDP-43 inhibits paraspeckle assembly in concentration-dependent manner; 3′-end UG repeat deletion increases paraspeckle stability and cytoprotection; longer UG repeats linked to shorter ALS survival
nature:10.1038/s41556-026-01895-y.comments: Elegant mechanistic link between condensate dynamics and disease outcome, with direct clinical relevance to ALS pathology.

nature:10.1038/s42255-026-01484-1.task: Determine role of lysosomal phosphoinositides in mTORC1 signaling and muscle growth
nature:10.1038/s42255-026-01484-1.model: (experiment) mouse models of myopathy; cellular myogenic differentiation
nature:10.1038/s42255-026-01484-1.inputs: Amino acid availability; ER stress; MTM1 phosphoinositide metabolism
nature:10.1038/s42255-026-01484-1.outputs: RagGTPase-mTORC1 activation; anabolic-catabolic balance; muscle growth
nature:10.1038/s42255-026-01484-1.key_results: PI3P and PI(3,5)P2 regulate LAMTOR complex stability; MTM1-dependent phosphoinositide remodeling suppresses mTORC1 under ER stress; restoring phosphoinositide homeostasis rescues muscle growth in myopathy models
nature:10.1038/s42255-026-01484-1.comments: Novel positioning of lipid metabolism as upstream mTORC1 regulator; direct disease relevance to myotubular myopathy.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44537-x.task: Elucidate PTP4A3 contribution to diabetic retinopathy via PI3K-AKT pathway
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44537-x.model: (experiment) endothelial cells; STZ-induced diabetic model; oxygen-induced retinopathy (OIR) model
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44537-x.inputs: PTP4A3 overexpression; diabetic conditions; PI3K/AKT inhibitors
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44537-x.outputs: Endothelial cell proliferation/migration; barrier integrity; retinal vascular leakage and neovascularization
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44537-x.key_results: PTP4A3 increased in diabetic retinopathy; overexpression promotes EC proliferation/migration and reduces Occludin/Claudin-5; PI3K/AKT inhibition partially alleviates PTP4A3-induced EC dysfunction
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44537-x.comments: Clear demonstration of phosphatase contribution to diabetic vascular pathology; partial dependence on PI3K-AKT suggests additional signaling mechanisms.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42663-0.task: Model seizure suppression via optogenetic modulation of neuron-astrocyte interactions
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42663-0.model: (computational) three-compartment model: neurons, astrocytes, extracellular space with ionic dynamics
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42663-0.inputs: Optogenetic stimulation (astrocytic ChR2) or inhibition (neuronal ArchT); dynamic Na+, K+, Ca2+ concentrations
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42663-0.outputs: Seizure severity; extracellular K+ clearance; neuronal spiking rate; Na+/K+-ATPase activity
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42663-0.key_results: Astrocytic stimulation reduces seizure severity by enhancing Na+ influx and Na+/K+-ATPase activity; effect persists despite impaired Ca2+ signaling or Kir4.1; combined astrocyte stimulation and neuronal inhibition synergistically decreases K+ and spiking
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42663-0.comments: Computational study identifying Na+/K+-ATPase as dominant seizure control mechanism; pre-seizure activation more effective than post-onset.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44561-x.task: Identify dysregulated proteins in glaucomatous trabecular meshwork cells via proteomics
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44561-x.model: (experiment) TMTpro isobaric quantitative proteomics; mass spectrometry; immunofluorescence
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44561-x.inputs: Glaucomatous vs. non-glaucomatous TM cell lysates
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44561-x.outputs: Differentially expressed proteins; pathway enrichment; subcellular localization patterns
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44561-x.key_results: 206 proteins upregulated in GTM cells; key pathways: ECM (DCN, COL4A1, CHI3L1), Wnt (FZD1, FZD7, GSK3B), cytoskeletal (ROCK2, MSN, TPM2, VIM), protein degradation, nuclear proteins; GTM nucleoli significantly larger; DIAPH2 more cytosolic
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44561-x.comments: Comprehensive proteomics with pathway validation and immunofluorescence confirmation; multiple dysregulated pathways suggest complex glaucomatous pathogenesis.
