nature:10.1038/s41598-026-40407-8.task: Evaluate cardioprotective effects of curcumin and piperine against obesity-induced oxidative stress
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-40407-8.model: (experiment) rat high-fat diet obesity model; in vivo treatment
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-40407-8.inputs: Curcumin (100 mg/kg) + piperine (5 mg/kg) oral treatment; high-fat diet exposure
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-40407-8.outputs: Cardiac oxidative stress markers (ROS, MDA, NO); antioxidant enzyme activity (CAT, GPx, SOD); inflammatory cytokines; lipid profiles; histological changes
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-40407-8.key_results: HFD increased MDA, NO, ROS and decreased antioxidants; reduced Na+/K+-ATPase activity and increased TNF-α, IL-1, IL-6; CUR+PIP suppressed cardiac oxidative stress, inflammation, and histological damage; downregulated NF-κB
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-40407-8.comments: Standard in vivo pharmacology model demonstrating antioxidant and anti-inflammatory benefits; multi-parameter assessment strengthens conclusions.

nature:10.1038/s42005-026-02585-9.task: Injection locking control of dissipative time crystals
nature:10.1038/s42005-026-02585-9.inputs: RF electric field at varying amplitude and frequency
nature:10.1038/s42005-026-02585-9.outputs: Oscillation frequency, locking bandwidth, synchronization state
nature:10.1038/s42005-026-02585-9.key_results: Full synchronization above critical threshold; locking bandwidth scales linearly with RF amplitude; higher-order harmonics entrained
nature:10.1038/s42005-026-02585-9.comments: Bridges classical nonlinear dynamics and quantum many-body physics, with practical applications in quantum metrology and precision sensing.

nature:10.1038/s42005-026-02561-3.task: Realization of higher-order exceptional points using frequency-dependent gain
nature:10.1038/s42005-026-02561-3.model: (circuit) PT-symmetric dimer and anti-PT-symmetric trimer with impedance observer
nature:10.1038/s42005-026-02561-3.inputs: Frequency-dependent gain derived from input impedance
nature:10.1038/s42005-026-02561-3.key_results: Third-order EP confirmed in PT-dimer; fifth-order EP verified in anti-PT-trimer; eliminates need for nonlinear-gain mechanisms
nature:10.1038/s42005-026-02561-3.comments: Offers experimentally accessible route to HOEPs without requiring nonlinear gain, substantially simplifying implementation.

nature:10.1038/s41699-026-00683-4.task: Dual-mode physically unclonable function using grain-boundary oxidation
nature:10.1038/s41699-026-00683-4.inputs: Photo-oxidative activation, electrical bias, optical excitation
nature:10.1038/s41699-026-00683-4.outputs: Electrical resistance, photocurrent response, cryptographic keys
nature:10.1038/s41699-026-00683-4.key_results: Maximal entropy achieved at optimized oxidation duration; dual electrical-optical challenge-response behavior; mode-orthogonal keys generated
nature:10.1038/s41699-026-00683-4.comments: Exploits intrinsic material microstructure for entropy generation without lithography, offering scalability for secure hardware.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-39918-1.task: Characterization of thermal, vibrational, and electrical properties of Ag₂Te
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-39918-1.inputs: Temperature range 163–520 K, X-ray/Raman/AC conductivity measurements
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-39918-1.outputs: Lattice parameters, decomposition behavior, vibrational modes, frequency-dependent conductivity
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-39918-1.key_results: Monoclinic lattice: a = 0.8165 nm, β = 112.81°; TGA reveals thermal decomposition; Raman identifies vibrational/bonding characteristics
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-39918-1.comments: Comprehensive characterization but limited quantitative thermoelectric performance metrics provided for advanced applications.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43686-3.task: Investigation of altermagnetism and chiral order in MnF₂
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43686-3.inputs: Resonant X-ray scattering, polarized neutron diffraction
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43686-3.outputs: Magnetic chiral signature, altermagnetic order parameter (axial octupole), spin-flip patterns
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43686-3.key_results: X-ray circular dichroism reveals magnetic chiral signature; neutron diffraction confirms axial octupole order parameter; spin-flip patterns test electronic structure
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43686-3.comments: Clever use of symmetry-informed scattering techniques to access higher-rank multipole tensors and verify electronic structure assumptions.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-41814-7.task: Underwater target detection using dual-sensor coherence-driven adaptive denoising
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-41814-7.model: (signal processing) CSEM-WF-VMD-DDCDO pipeline with dual magnetometers
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-41814-7.inputs: Shaft-rate magnetic field signals at ultra-low SNR (−54.39 dB) with interference line spectra and colored noise
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-41814-7.outputs: Detected magnetic field, target classification, false alarm rate
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-41814-7.key_results: 95.83% accuracy on field test data; detects shaft-rate magnetic field at SNR = −54.39 dB; coherent spatial combination attenuates interference while preserving target
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-41814-7.comments: Practical engineering solution combining multiple signal processing techniques; color noise handling is realistic but performance on diverse ocean conditions unclear.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44107-1.task: Scale-up of silver particle flattening using DEM simulation
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44107-1.model: (DEM simulation + experiment) dry ball milling of silver particles in vibration mills
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44107-1.inputs: Mill size, ball motion parameters, collision energies from DEM
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44107-1.outputs: Normalized specific surface area (SSA), flattening rate constant Kf, specific impact energy Ew
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44107-1.key_results: Normal component of Ew has highest prediction accuracy; SSA scaling validated from small to large mill scales; Kf and Ew predict arbitrary timescales
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44107-1.comments: Rigorous validation of DEM-derived impact energy metrics for process scale-up; focus on normal vs. shear components provides practical guidance.

nature:10.1038/s43246-026-01139-4.task: Investigation of electron-phonon coupling and Jahn-Teller effects in La₁₋ₓSrₓMnO₃ with weak CMR
nature:10.1038/s43246-026-01139-4.model: (experiment + DFT) perovskite manganites with neutron scattering
nature:10.1038/s43246-026-01139-4.outputs: Phonon dispersions, magnon dispersions, Jahn–Teller optical vibration intensity, quasielastic scattering
nature:10.1038/s43246-026-01139-4.key_results: Jahn–Teller-active optical phonons collapse above Tc despite low CMR; diffusive quasistatic carrier-trapping distortions emerge; magnetoresistance correlates with diffusion rate, not JT coupling strength
nature:10.1038/s43246-026-01139-4.comments: Challenges conventional CMR theory by decoupling JT coupling strength from magnetoresistance magnitude; implies CMR driven by carrier dynamics rather than lattice mechanism.

nature:10.1038/s41535-026-00870-y.task: Clarification of strain-tuned ferroelectric phase transition pathway in HfO₂
nature:10.1038/s41535-026-00870-y.model: (DFT + theory) HfO₂ with phonon mode instability analysis
nature:10.1038/s41535-026-00870-y.inputs: Tensile/compressive strain, symmetry analysis of Pca21 phase
nature:10.1038/s41535-026-00870-y.outputs: Phase stability, order parameter (X₂⁻ displacement), Landau coefficients, transition pathway
nature:10.1038/s41535-026-00870-y.key_results: X₂⁻ mode coupling with polar/antipolar distortions lowers trilinear-coupling barrier; tensile strain enhances X₂⁻ displacement and destabilizes intermediate phases; X₂⁻ engineering controls Pca21 fraction
nature:10.1038/s41535-026-00870-y.comments: Novel mechanistic insight into HfO₂ ferroelectricity via higher-order displacement coupling; practical control parameter X₂⁻ identified for device engineering.

nature:10.1038/s41377-025-02181-6.model: (experiment) room-temperature quantum memory with correlated photon generation
nature:10.1038/s41377-025-02181-6.inputs: Correlated photon pairs from quantum memory, photon count accumulation
nature:10.1038/s41377-025-02181-6.outputs: Computation results (addition/multiplication), parallel task acceleration, stochastic output
nature:10.1038/s41377-025-02181-6.key_results: Addition and multiplication via photon count accumulation; multiple tasks parallelized; nonclassical correlations accelerate computation; inherent security via eavesdropping difficulty
nature:10.1038/s41377-025-02181-6.comments: Creative repurposing of quantum memory as computing substrate; stochastic security claim interesting but scalability to practical problem sizes not demonstrated.

nature:10.1038/s41563-026-02538-1.task: Investigation of non-monotonic friction from magnetic rotor dynamics
nature:10.1038/s41563-026-02538-1.model: (MD simulation + experiment) 2D array of rotatable magnetic moments on commensurate substrate
nature:10.1038/s41563-026-02538-1.outputs: Friction force, torque cycles, collective magnetic reorientation patterns
nature:10.1038/s41563-026-02538-1.key_results: Non-monotonic friction vs. interlayer separation with pronounced peak at intermediate distance; friction driven by competing FM/AFM interactions and dynamical frustration; energy dissipation from hysteretic torque cycles
nature:10.1038/s41563-026-02538-1.comments: Elegant demonstration that Amontons' law breaks down when internal magnetic degrees of freedom dominate; opens door to contactless friction control via magnetic tuning.

nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70295-5.task: Characterization of equilibrium rotator glass phase in colloidal rods
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70295-5.model: (experiment + simulation) charged colloidal rods with long-range repulsion
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70295-5.inputs: Volume fraction, external electric field, temperature
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70295-5.outputs: Positional order, rotational order parameter, phase diagram, transition type
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70295-5.key_results: Equilibrium glassy rotator phase exhibits glass-like positions but liquid-like rotations; reversible switching to crystal via first-order transition with minimal rearrangements under E-field
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70295-5.comments: Rare observation of equilibrium glass-forming phase; decoupling of translational and rotational order is conceptually interesting but mechanisms governing glass formation remain complex.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-41410-9.task: Predict vertebrate species susceptibility to sarbecovirus infection
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-41410-9.model: Multi-reference Similarity Analysis of Receptor Sequences (MrSARS)
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-41410-9.key_results: Primates and even-toed ungulates ranked highest susceptibility; experimental validation with VSV pseudotypes correlated with predictions
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-41410-9.comments: Strong concordance between sequence analysis and experimental infection, though mechanistic basis may vary across species.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44536-y.task: Cross-subject generalization in EEG-based seizure detection
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44536-y.model: lightweight deep convolutional neural network with power spectral density features
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44536-y.outputs: seizure/non-seizure classification; event-based false alarm rate
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44536-y.key_results: 85.84% accuracy CHB-MIT, 83.21% TUSZ; 1.9–2.1 ms inference time; 0.33–1.09 false alarms/hour
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44536-y.comments: Excellent efficiency and cross-subject generalization, but false alarm rate on heterogeneous TUSZ dataset remains clinically challenging.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44093-4.task: Reconstruct timing and amount of alcohol consumption from biomarkers
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44093-4.model: physiological digital twin integrating multi-kinetic metabolism
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44093-4.inputs: BAC, BrAC, EtG, EtS, UAC measurements
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44093-4.outputs: personalized alcohol intake and metabolism trajectories; drinking scenario reconstruction
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44093-4.key_results: integrated model substantially improves temporal reconstruction of past drinking events; interactive web tool provided
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44093-4.comments: Mechanistic integration of fast and slow biomarkers is novel, though forensic validation in real cases remains limited.

nature:10.1038/s41597-026-07030-8.task: Assemble and annotate reference genome for pecan weevil
nature:10.1038/s41597-026-07030-8.model: PacBio HiFi long-read sequencing + Hi-C scaffolding
nature:10.1038/s41597-026-07030-8.inputs: ~40x PacBio HiFi reads; Hi-C chromatin contact data; Iso-Seq RNA
nature:10.1038/s41597-026-07030-8.key_results: 2.2 Gb assembly; N50 132 Mb; BUSCO 95.4%; ~19,000 protein-coding genes; >80% repeat content
nature:10.1038/s41597-026-07030-8.comments: High-quality assembly suitable for comparative genomics; extensive repeats typical of insects but provide insights into pest biology.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44589-z.task: Identify BPA-associated molecular pathways in endometrial cancer
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44589-z.inputs: BPA toxicological predictions; TCGA-UCEC gene expression; GEO dataset
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44589-z.outputs: BPA-EC associated genes; pathway enrichment; survival associations
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44589-z.key_results: 129 BPA-EC genes identified; 48 DEGs in TCGA; 5 prognostic genes (ESR1, NOTCH1, GABARAP, B4GALT1, PAN3); angiogenesis and EGFR/MAPK pathway enrichment
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44589-z.comments: Comprehensive hypothesis-generating study; molecular docking is in silico only and lacks direct BPA-protein binding validation.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44038-x.task: Characterize allophycocyanin inhibition of HIV-1 entry and replication
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44038-x.model: molecular dynamics simulation + isothermal titration calorimetry + cell-based assays
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44038-x.inputs: APC protein structure; HIV-1 gp120, protease, RT structures
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44038-x.outputs: binding affinities; RT enzymatic activity; viral protein abundance; redox balance
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44038-x.key_results: APC binds gp120 with favorable free energy and enthalpy-driven interaction; inhibits RT activity and reduces viral protein; mitigates oxidative stress in infected cells
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44038-x.comments: Strong multi-modal validation (simulation, biophysics, cells); cellular uptake mechanisms and in vivo efficacy remain uncharacterized.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44040-3.task: Protect medical imaging training data from adversarial attacks via blockchain
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44040-3.model: Hyperledger Fabric + Private IPFS decentralized storage
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44040-3.inputs: MRI brain scans; access control policies
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44040-3.outputs: tamper-proof dataset storage; cryptographic data provenance
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44040-3.key_results: decentralized framework ensures data integrity and prevents unauthorized access; Hyperledger Caliper validates performance
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44040-3.comments: Addresses real threat to medical AI, but doesn't demonstrate actual adversarial robustness of downstream models trained on protected data.

nature:10.1038/s41538-026-00802-x.task: Characterize food chemistry and trace molecular origins across foods
nature:10.1038/s41538-026-00802-x.outputs: annotated compounds; xenobiotic signatures; natural product identifications
nature:10.1038/s41538-026-00802-x.key_results: characteristic chemical patterns per food group; unannotated features reveal contamination pathways; unexpected natural products (e.g., biochanin A) identified in Canada thistle
nature:10.1038/s41538-026-00802-x.comments: Valuable One Health perspective linking environment to food to human health; majority of features remain unannotated, limiting mechanistic interpretation.

nature:10.1038/s41746-026-02545-1.task: Assess integration of AI as active collaborator in diagnostic workflows
nature:10.1038/s41746-026-02545-1.model: large language model (LLM) with collaborative reasoning framework
nature:10.1038/s41746-026-02545-1.inputs: clinical case information; independent clinician and AI assessments
nature:10.1038/s41746-026-02545-1.key_results: AI-first and AI-second workflows both improved clinician accuracy (85%, 82% vs. 75% baseline); performance comparable to AI-alone (90%); qualitative analysis illustrates workflow design shapes interaction
nature:10.1038/s41746-026-02545-1.comments: Important shift from tool-centric to collaborative paradigm; modest sample (n=70) and unclear if gains persist across broader case diversity.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44721-z.task: Identify neutrophil extracellular trap-associated biomarkers in comorbid osteoporosis-diabetes
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44721-z.model: transcriptomic integration + machine learning + network analysis
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44721-z.inputs: transcriptomic dataset; NETs-related genes from literature; immune infiltration
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44721-z.outputs: candidate biomarkers; regulatory axes; drug predictions
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44721-z.key_results: S100A12 and SLC25A37 identified as biomarkers; upregulated at protein level in validation cohort; enriched in 68 and 54 pathways respectively; XIST-miR-146a-5p-S100A12 and XIST-miR-7-5p-SLC25A37 regulatory axes proposed
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44721-z.comments: Hypothesis-generating pilot leveraging multiple analysis modalities; limited sample size and lack of functional validation require larger follow-up studies.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43169-5.task: Automate discovery and ranking of interesting biomedical phenomena
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43169-5.model: machine learning + knowledge graphs + literature search + LLMs
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43169-5.key_results: up to 21% of suggested factors appeared in literature after cutoff; 28% deemed interesting by physicians; 40–53% of top-ranked candidates interesting vs. 0–20% for SHAP/L1 baselines
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43169-5.comments: Novel operationalization of 'interestingness' as multi-modal score; time-split evaluation is principled, but annotation by only 4 physicians limits generalizability.

nature:10.1038/s41598-025-32409-9.task: Detect camouflaged objects via context and texture integration
nature:10.1038/s41598-025-32409-9.model: context/texture encoder branches + multi-head feature aggregation + hierarchical interaction modules
nature:10.1038/s41598-025-32409-9.inputs: RGB images; texture and boundary labels
nature:10.1038/s41598-025-32409-9.key_results: superior performance on CAMO, COD10K, NC4K benchmarks; promising generalization to polyp segmentation downstream task
nature:10.1038/s41598-025-32409-9.comments: Well-motivated architecture combining contextual and texture cues; quantitative metrics (e.g., MAE, F-measure) not reported in abstract.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44409-4.task: Flexible job shop scheduling with machine deterioration
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44409-4.inputs: Job shop scheduling problem with machine degradation parameters
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44409-4.key_results: IWOA balances global and local search via nonlinear convergence factors and golden sinusoidal strategies; effectiveness proven via simulation experiments
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44409-4.comments: Standard metaheuristic application; lacks detailed comparison metrics against baselines.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43402-1.task: Vibration error correction in gravity measurement
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43402-1.inputs: Vibration signals and falling body trajectories
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43402-1.outputs: Corrected time coordinate errors and gravitational acceleration
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43402-1.key_results: Measurement accuracies: 1.51 µGal (H03), 1.30 µGal (H09), 3.01 µGal (H20); Adam optimizer improves convergence over SGD
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43402-1.comments: Practical metrology application; Adam acceleration is standard; achieves sub-µGal precision in field conditions.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43692-5.task: Battery management system with SOH and RUL prediction
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43692-5.inputs: EV battery cycling data (voltage, current, temperature)
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43692-5.outputs: State of Health, Remaining Useful Life, optimal charge-discharge policy
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43692-5.key_results: SOH: R² 0.9926–0.9995; RUL: RMSE 3.36, MAE 2.09; RL policy gain 24±1.2%; thermal runaway detection >92% accuracy
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43692-5.comments: Comprehensive modular framework; strong empirical results on proprietary and public datasets; real-world deployment ready.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44145-9.task: Crowd counting and facility utilization assessment
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44145-9.inputs: Images/video of sports facilities, facility metadata, demographic data
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44145-9.outputs: Crowd counts, usage patterns, supply-demand gaps, optimization recommendations
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44145-9.key_results: Crowd counting accuracy 93.8%; LLM recommendations scored 4.2/5.0 by domain experts
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44145-9.comments: Novel synergy of lightweight vision and LLM for actionable insights; strong practical applicability.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44084-5.task: Robust cyber-physical control for islanded/interconnected microgrids
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44084-5.model: Event-Triggered Sliding Mode Controller (ET-SMC) with Extended Kalman Filter and Sliding Mode Observer
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44084-5.inputs: Renewable generation, network delays, DoS attacks, false data injection signals
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44084-5.outputs: Voltage and reactive power regulation commands
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44084-5.key_results: Enhanced robustness, quicker transient response, reduced chattering vs. PID and baseline SMC; validated on OPAL-RT hardware-in-the-loop testbed
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44084-5.comments: Addresses real cyber-security and communication challenges in modern grids; Lyapunov stability guarantees provided.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42400-7.model: Improved Red-tailed Hawk Algorithm (IRTHA) with chaotic mapping and nonlinear decay
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42400-7.inputs: I-V curve data for single/double/triple diode PV models
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42400-7.key_results: RMSE: 7.73e-4 (SDM-RTC), 7.42e-4 (DDM), 7.35e-4 (TDM); outperforms PSO, GWO, etc. via Friedman and Wilcoxon tests
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42400-7.comments: Metaheuristic with proven convergence and diversity balance; validated on five real PV cell/module datasets.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42912-2.task: Multimodal sentiment analysis on text and images
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42912-2.model: Deep Maxout (text) + MS-Bi-GRU (image) optimized by Innovative Beluga Whale Optimization (IBwOA)
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42912-2.inputs: Text (N-grams, emojis, TF-IDF) and image features (multitexon, SLBT)
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42912-2.key_results: Outperforms conventional models across multiple metrics; IBwOA-optimized Deep Maxout weights improve text feature learning
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42912-2.comments: Hybrid architecture effectively combines modalities; transfer learning for images is standard practice.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42865-6.task: Recommendation system with knowledge graph reasoning
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42865-6.model: Knowledge Graph Enhanced Reasoning Architecture (KGERA); ensemble of ItemKNN, LightGCN, SGL, SimGCL, NCF, TransE, TextProxy, PopRec
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42865-6.inputs: User-item interactions, item metadata, knowledge graph (genre, creator, similarity)
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42865-6.key_results: NDCG@10 +52.83%, Recall@10 +50.24%, MRR@10 +54.62% vs. best baseline on MovieLens-1M; robust across user/item tiers (5-fold CV=4.84%)
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-42865-6.comments: Lightweight inference-time reasoning avoids expensive LLM calls; extensive ablation and stratification validation; p<0.001 significance.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43841-w.task: Text-guided image segmentation with vision Mamba
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43841-w.model: H-type Bidirectional Alignment Network: Vision Mamba (SSM) + Qwen LLM + Q-Former + multi-scale decoder
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43841-w.key_results: Strong performance on RefCOCO, RefCOCO+, RefCOCOg; bidirectional cross-modal supervision via Q-Former
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-43841-w.comments: State space models (Mamba) efficiently capture long-range visual context; selective attention and local convolution balance expressivity and efficiency.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44214-z.task: Intrusion detection with epistemic uncertainty analysis
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44214-z.model: AA-NLS (Algebraic Average-based Neutrosophic Logic), HLWBMM, GRUSO-GRU, LCFFOA, PESHAP
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44214-z.inputs: Network packet data, behavioral and temporal patterns
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44214-z.key_results: Accuracy 99.299% (full multi-class); AA-NLS addresses out-of-order packet uncertainty; PESHAP provides explainability
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44214-z.comments: Complex pipeline with neutrosophic logic for handling incomplete data; strong accuracy but limited novelty in individual components.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44542-0.task: Underwater debris detection and material classification
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44542-0.model: Lightweight Mask R-CNN with upgraded RPN and MobileNetV3 backbone
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44542-0.inputs: Underwater images with color distortion and low contrast
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44542-0.outputs: Instance segmentation and debris material class labels
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44542-0.key_results: Real-time performance at 30 FPS; mAP, SSIM, IoU, PSNR improvements over conventional approaches; data augmentation (contrast, flip, blur) enhances robustness
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44542-0.comments: Practical system for marine waste management; lightweight architecture crucial for real-time deployment on edge devices.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44146-8.task: Sketch recognition with CycleGAN and dual attention
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44146-8.model: Improved CycleGAN (multi-directional convolution, brightness equalization) + channel and spatial attention modules + classifier
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44146-8.key_results: TU-Berlin: 97.08% accuracy, 98.12% precision, 98.23% recall, 97.45% F1; QuickDraw: 98.65% accuracy, 98.12% precision, 98.76% recall, 97.95% F1
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44146-8.comments: Dual attention effectively handles sparse strokes and uneven spatial distribution; strong benchmarks suggest practical sketch-to-animation pipeline.

nature:10.1038/s44333-026-00088-2.task: Role of humanoid robots in autonomous public transport
nature:10.1038/s44333-026-00088-2.inputs: Autonomous shuttle systems without on-board staff
nature:10.1038/s44333-026-00088-2.outputs: Enhanced passenger support and safety services
nature:10.1038/s44333-026-00088-2.key_results: Conceptual proposal to integrate humanoid robots as complement to autonomous shuttles
nature:10.1038/s44333-026-00088-2.comments: Position paper addressing loss of human assistance in fully autonomous systems; lacks empirical validation or detailed design.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44535-z.task: Underwater image enhancement via color correction and recurrent CNN
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44535-z.model: Customized color correction (dynamic attenuation coefficients) + Recurrent Convolutional Neural Networks (R-CNN)
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44535-z.inputs: Degraded underwater images (low contrast, color distortion, reduced visibility)
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44535-z.outputs: Enhanced images with improved clarity, contrast, visibility
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44535-z.key_results: Superior image quality over state-of-the-art methods; improved performance in downstream tasks (object detection, recognition, monitoring)
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44535-z.comments: Recurrent design iteratively refines features, preserving details better than static CNNs; adaptive color correction handles dynamic underwater conditions.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-40442-5.task: Biomass torrefaction analysis and simulator deployment
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-40442-5.model: Ensemble ML (linear, ensemble, boosting, kernel) with domain-informed feature engineering; CatBoost best performer
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-40442-5.inputs: Torrefaction operating conditions (temperature, time, heating rate), feedstock properties
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-40442-5.outputs: Mass yield (MY) and higher heating value (HHV) predictions
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-40442-5.key_results: CatBoost robust across datasets with stable feature attribution; GUI simulator visualizes MY-HHV trade-offs and identifies feasible operating windows
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-40442-5.comments: Practical engineering tool replacing trial-and-error; tree-based models excel due to domain complexity and nonlinearity.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44111-5.task: 3D point cloud completion from partial inputs
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44111-5.model: GAN-based architecture (encoder, generator, discriminator) with multi-term joint loss
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44111-5.inputs: Partial 3D point clouds with high occlusion/noise
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44111-5.key_results: Chamfer Distance=0.085, Earth Mover's Distance=0.199, F-Score=0.208 on ModelNet40; supports downstream tasks (path planning, robotic grasping)
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44111-5.comments: End-to-end framework handles high missing-rate scenarios better than prior methods; no paired training data required.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-41068-3.task: Battery thermal management system design with multiple cooling plates
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-41068-3.model: Thermal fluid analysis coupled with optimization (objective: minimize pack-level temperature difference)
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-41068-3.inputs: LIB pack configuration, cooling plate parameters, operating conditions
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-41068-3.outputs: Optimized cooling plate design and flow rates
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-41068-3.key_results: Temperature difference reduction of 2.25 K by equalizing cooling performance; constraints: max temperature, pumping power
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-41068-3.comments: Addresses non-uniform temperature distribution in EV packs; interaction effects among cooling plates properly handled.

nature:10.1038/s44335-026-00061-9.task: Error correction for processing-in-memory multiply-accumulate operations
nature:10.1038/s44335-026-00061-9.model: Non-binary LDPC codes over Galois Field GF(3) for analog/memristor-based PIM
nature:10.1038/s44335-026-00061-9.inputs: 8-symbol error-prone multiply-accumulate results from memristor arrays
nature:10.1038/s44335-026-00061-9.outputs: Corrected computation results with provable error tolerance
nature:10.1038/s44335-026-00061-9.key_results: 59.65× BER reduction, 1.562× power efficiency gain, 8-symbol error correction; 40nm prototype validated; unified error correction for memory and computation
nature:10.1038/s44335-026-00061-9.comments: GF-based approach elegantly handles non-ideal analog devices; eliminates dataflow interruption; enables robust neuromorphic hardware.

nature:10.1038/s44172-026-00634-3.task: 3D visualization of sparse histology data in virtual reality
nature:10.1038/s44172-026-00634-3.inputs: stacks of labeled masks and color images from serial sectioned histology
nature:10.1038/s44172-026-00634-3.outputs: interactive 3D textured models with embedded measurements in VR environment
nature:10.1038/s44172-026-00634-3.key_results: SparStVR enables unprecedented interactive discovery of tissue structures and pathology compared to traditional projection-based tools
nature:10.1038/s44172-026-00634-3.comments: This is a visualization/software tool rather than a biological systems modeling paper; no quantitative validation metrics are provided in the abstract.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-37033-9.task: evaluate clinical efficacy of combined herbal and pharmaceutical treatment for asthma
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-37033-9.inputs: patients with bronchial asthma receiving Chaipu Decoction plus Seretide or Seretide alone
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-37033-9.outputs: clinical efficacy rate, lung function indices (FEV1, FVC, FEV1/FVC, PEF), serum TNF-α, CD4+/CD8+ ratio, ACT scores
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-37033-9.key_results: combination treatment achieved 86.7% vs. 66.7% efficacy (p<0.05); greater TNF-α reduction and CD4+/CD8+ ratio increase; no significant adverse reaction increase
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-37033-9.comments: This is a clinical trial paper, not a systems biology study; results suggest immunological and functional benefit but lack mechanistic insight into how the herbal decoction modulates immune response.

nature:10.1038/s41556-025-01837-0.task: map genetic network controlling autophagy activation and inactivation during nutrient changes
nature:10.1038/s41556-025-01837-0.model: time-resolved high-content imaging with deep learning and latent feature analysis on 5,919 yeast mutants
nature:10.1038/s41556-025-01837-0.inputs: nutrient (nitrogen) changes; mutant library profiled by imaging
nature:10.1038/s41556-025-01837-0.outputs: categorized mutant phenotypes by nutrient response kinetics; hierarchical regulatory network; retrograde pathway identification
nature:10.1038/s41556-025-01837-0.key_results: identified retrograde pathway as pivotal time-varying modulator of autophagy gene expression and central regulator of autophagy inactivation; comprehensive genetic network resource (AutoDRY) with 5,919 mutants
nature:10.1038/s41556-025-01837-0.comments: Excellent systems-level approach combining high-throughput phenotyping with network inference; the discovery of retrograde pathway as a time-dependent switch for autophagy inactivation is biologically significant and mechanistically insightful.

nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70409-z.task: Screen small molecules for WDR5 oligomerization induction and elucidate mechanism
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70409-z.outputs: Oligomerization inducers; structural mechanism; anti-tumor activity
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70409-z.key_results: WZ-1 identified as selective WDR5 oligomerizer; triggers oligomerization via thio-disulfide exchange; potent anti-tumor activity in cellular assays
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70409-z.comments: Nanopore screening is elegant for kinetic resolution, though mechanism validation required complementary cryo-EM and biochemistry.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44315-9.task: Characterize acute physiological and pupillary responses to weightlifting training
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44315-9.model: (experiment) elite female weightlifters; 75% and 100% max load training
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44315-9.inputs: Training load intensity; body measurements at rest, power snatch, clean & jerk, cool-down phases
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44315-9.outputs: Vital signs; pupil diameter; correlations with performance
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44315-9.key_results: All vital signs significantly different across training phases (p≤0.001); positive correlation between max clean & jerk and systolic BP in 100% max group (r=0.37-0.44)
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44315-9.comments: Pupillary response measurement is interesting biomarker of autonomic state, though causality between measurements and performance remains unclear.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44047-w.task: Characterize biomechanics of unsegmented marine annelids for soft robotics inspiration
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44047-w.model: (experiment) Phascolosoma stephensoni; mathematical peristalsis model; magneto-responsive silicone soft robot
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44047-w.inputs: Live sipunculan specimens; micro-CT imaging; tensile testing
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44047-w.outputs: Morphometric parameters; strain thresholds; locomotion speeds; robotic protrusion capability
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44047-w.key_results: Introvert eversion doubles total body length (8.87→18.75 mm); trunk strain capacity ≈90-110% vs introvert ≈60-65%; peristalsis model predicts 0.5-5 mm/s in confined media; soft robot achieves 2.5× initial length protrusion
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44047-w.comments: Excellent integration of morphology, mechanics, and mathematical modeling; soft robot demonstration validates biological insights.

nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70575-0.task: Resolve pH-sensing mechanism and ivermectin modulation in mite ion channel SsCl
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70575-0.inputs: SsCl protein; different pH conditions; ivermectin
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70575-0.outputs: Structures at closed and desensitized states; pH-sensing residues; ivermectin binding modes
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70575-0.key_results: Desensitized state (pH 9) adopts hourglass conformation; histidine and glutamic acid residues identified as pH sensors; ivermectin enhances open-state at pH 9, enables atypical activation at pH 6.5
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70575-0.comments: Hourglass conformation is unexpected and suggests mechanistic parallels to cation channels; implications for antiparasitic design are promising.

nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70643-5.task: Determine structure and regulatory mechanisms of GSDME pore formation
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70643-5.inputs: Human GSDME protein; caspase-3; lipids; S-palmitoylation
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70643-5.outputs: High-resolution pore structures; activated and regulated states; mechanistic framework
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70643-5.key_results: 27- and 28-fold pore structures at 3.64-3.58 Å; caspase-3 recognizes DMPD tetrapeptide independently of C-terminal domain; S-palmitoylation at Cys180 enhances pore-forming efficiency
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70643-5.comments: Sequential proteolytic licensing and lipid modification represent elegant two-step regulatory mechanism; structural detail guides therapeutic targeting.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44343-5.task: Characterize DPMS catalysis and potential lipid-translocation by transmembrane domain
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44343-5.inputs: Pyrococcus furiosus DPMS; GDP-mannose; dolichylphosphate; crystal complex from reaction mixture
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44343-5.outputs: Active site geometry; donor/acceptor binding states; TM domain conformations; lipid translocation evidence
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44343-5.key_results: TM domain binds Dol-P-Man in unexpected 'upside-down' orientation with mannosylphosphate in polar pocket; TM domain not essential for catalysis but potentially provides moonlighting translocation function
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-44343-5.comments: Upside-down product binding is intriguing; moonlighting function hypothesis requires kinetic validation but is structurally compelling.

nature:10.1038/s41467-026-69170-0.task: Investigate solvent and symmetry effects on protein nanorod assembly at liquid-solid interface
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-69170-0.model: (experiment & theory) high-speed AFM, machine learning, Monte Carlo simulations
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-69170-0.inputs: Designed protein nanorods; mica substrates with different symmetries; aqueous electrolytes
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-69170-0.outputs: Assembly phases; smectic ordering; effect of hydration structure on assembly patterns
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-69170-0.key_results: Smectic phase emerges from crystal symmetry-induced directional bias; hydration structure modulates assembly; Monte Carlo simulations reproduce observed phases
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-69170-0.comments: Coupling AFM/ML to physics-based simulations is methodologically sophisticated; highlights overlooked importance of solvent structure in protein design.

nature:10.1038/s41598-026-40136-y.task: Characterize DNA-binding mode of dolutegravir and assess genotoxic potential
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-40136-y.model: (experiment & theory) UV-Vis spectroscopy, fluorescence, viscosity, molecular docking
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-40136-y.inputs: Dolutegravir; salmon sperm DNA; temperature variation; ionic strength variation
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-40136-y.outputs: Binding constant; binding mode; thermodynamic parameters; in silico docking predictions
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-40136-y.key_results: Binding constant Kb=10³ M⁻¹; groove-binding mechanism (non-intercalative); GC-rich region preference; ΔG°=-15.0 to -25.4 kJ/mol; ΔH°=-198.51 kJ/mol; primarily H-bonds and van der Waals
nature:10.1038/s41598-026-40136-y.comments: Comprehensive biophysical validation of groove binding; thermodynamic data suggest kinetic stability; genotoxic assessment requires cellular validation.

nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70514-z.task: Extend label-free nanofluidic scattering microscopy to sub-10 kDa biomolecules
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70514-z.model: (experiment & theory) nanofluidic scattering microscopy; hierarchical vision transformer; Cramér-Rao Lower Bound
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70514-z.inputs: Few-kDa proteins/peptides (e.g., insulin); ultrasmall nanofluidic channels; visible light scattering
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70514-z.outputs: Molecular weight; hydrodynamic radius; single-molecule characterization
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70514-z.key_results: Extended sensitivity from ≈60 kDa to <6 kDa; achievable hydrodynamic radius ≈1.5 nm; approaches theoretical limits with sufficiently long trajectories
nature:10.1038/s41467-026-70514-z.comments: Vision transformer dramatically improves SNR; extending to sub-10 kDa opens biological relevance to cytokines/chemokines but requires ultrahigh throughput for statistical power.
